requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks
- Responsible Business Conduct) Directions, 2025.
requirements.object: Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Responsible Business Conduct) Directions, 2025

requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall come into effect immediately upon issuance, unless
indicated otherwise.
requirements.object: upon issuance

requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be applicable to Regional Rural Banks (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'RRBs' and individually as an 'RRB').
requirements.object: Rural Banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'RRBs' and individually as an 'RRB')

requirements.full_sentence:
In these Directions, unless the context states otherwise, the terms herein shall bear
the meanings assigned to them below:
(1) Accounts with survivorship clause means joint deposit accounts styled as
'either or survivor', or 'anyone or survivor', or 'former or survivor' or 'latter or survivor'
or any other such clause.
requirements.object: to them below: (1) Accounts with survivorship clause means joint deposit accounts styled as 'either or survivor', or 'anyon

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Apostille means a certificate that authenticates the origin of a public document
(e.g., a birth, marriage or death certificate, a judgment, an extract of a register or a
notarial attestation).
requirements.object: the origin of a public document (e

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Annual Percentage Rate (APR) means the annual cost of credit to the
borrower which includes interest rate and all other charges associated with the
credit facility.
requirements.object: credit to the borrower which includes interest rate and all other charges associated with the credit facility

requirements.full_sentence:
(4) Bank induced transaction means a transaction in the account initiated by the
bank as per its extant policy such as charges, fees, interest payments, penalties,
taxes.
requirements.object: account initiated by the bank as per its extant policy such as charges, fees, interest payments, penalties, taxes

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall put in place approved policies and establish periodic review mechanisms
to ensure sound business conduct and enhanced customer service.
requirements.object: policies and establish periodic review mechanisms to ensure sound business conduct and enhanced customer service

requirements.full_sentence:
Matters relating to customer service shall be deliberated by the Board to ensure that
the instructions are implemented meaningfully.
requirements.object: Board to ensure that the instructions are implemented meaningfully

requirements.full_sentence:
Commitment to hassle-free service to the
customer at large and the common person in particular should be the major responsibility
of the Board.
requirements.object: of the Board

requirements.full_sentence:
Customer service shall be projected as a priority objective of banks along with profit,
growth and fulfilment of social obligations.
requirements.object: priority objective of banks along with profit, growth and fulfilment of social obligations
policy for the following: B

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall formulate a transparent and comprehensive policy setting out the rights
of the depositors in general and small depositors in particular.
requirements.object: comprehensive policy setting out the rights of the depositors in general and small depositors in particular

requirements.full_sentence:
The policy shall cover all
aspects of operations of deposit accounts, charges leviable and other related issues to
facilitate interaction of depositors at branch levels.
requirements.object: operations of deposit accounts, charges leviable and other related issues to facilitate interaction of depositors at branch level

requirements.full_sentence:
Such a policy shall also be explicit
regarding secrecy and confidentiality of the customers.
requirements.object: secrecy and confidentiality of the customers

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall formulate a comprehensive and transparent policy taking into account
its technological capabilities, systems and processes adopted for clearing arrangements
and other internal arrangements for collection through correspondents.
requirements.object: transparent policy taking into account its technological capabilities, systems and processes adopted for clearing arrang

requirements.full_sentence:
The policy shall
cover the following three aspects:
(1) Immediate Credit for Local / Outstation cheques
(2) Time frame for Collection of Local / Outstation Instruments
(3) Interest payment for delayed collection
B.2.3 Customer Compensation Policy
requirements.object: aspects: (1) Immediate Credit for Local / Outstation cheques (2) Time frame for Collection of Local / Outstation Instruments

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall have a Board approved Customer Compensation Policy which shall at
a minimum, incorporate the following aspects:
(1) Erroneous Debits arising on fraudulent or other transactions,
(2) Payment of interest for delays in collection,
(3) Payment of interest for delay in issue of duplicate draft, and
(4) Other unauthorised actions of the RRB leading to a financial loss to customer.
requirements.object: Customer Compensation Policy which shall at a minimum, incorporate the following aspects: (1) Erroneous Debits arising on fraudu

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall ensure that wide publicity is given to the above policies formulated by
it by placing them prominently on the website as well as displaying them on the notice
board of its branches.

requirements.full_sentence:
The RRB shall also take necessary steps to keep the customers
duly informed of the changes in the policies formulated by it from time to time.
requirements.object: to keep the customers duly informed of the changes in the policies formulated by it from time to time

requirements.full_sentence:
The
customers shall be clearly apprised of the assurances of the RRB on the services
provided, at the time of establishment of the initial relationship, be it as a depositor,
borrower or otherwise.
requirements.object: the assurances of the RRB on the services provided, at the time of establishment of the initial relationship, be it as a deposi

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall constitute a Customer Service Committee of the Board and include
experts and representatives of customers as invitees to enable the RRB to formulate
policies and assess the compliance thereof internally.
requirements.object: Committee of the Board and include experts and representatives of customers as invitees to enable the RRB to formulate p

requirements.full_sentence:
Customer Service Committee of the Board, illustratively, shall address the following:
(1) Formulation of a Comprehensive Deposit Policy,
(2) Issues such as the treatment of death of a depositor for operations of his account,
(3) Product approval process with a view to suitability and appropriateness,
(4) Annual survey of depositor satisfaction, and
(5) Triennial audit of such services.

requirements.object: issues having a bearing on the quality of customer service rendered

requirements.full_sentence:
A detailed memorandum reviewing customer service / customer care aspects of the
RRB shall be placed once in every six months to the Board of Directors.
requirements.object: every six months to the Board of Directors

requirements.full_sentence:
Prompt corrective
action shall be initiated wherever service quality / skill gaps are noticed.
requirements.object: quality / skill gaps are noticed

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall have a Standing Committee on Customer Service, cutting across
various departments, which shall serve as the micro level executive committee driving the
implementation process and providing relevant feedback.

requirements.full_sentence:
The Customer Service
Committee of the Board shall oversee and review / modify the initiatives.
requirements.object: modify the initiatives

requirements.full_sentence:
These two
Committees shall be mutually reinforcing with one feeding into the other.
requirements.object: one feeding into the other

requirements.full_sentence:
The constitution and functions of the Standing Committee shall be on the lines
indicated below:
(1) The Standing Committee shall be chaired by the Chairman and include non-officials
as its members to enable an independent feedback on the quality of customer
service rendered by the RRB.
requirements.object: indicated below: (1) The Standing Committee shall be chaired by the Chairman and include non-officials as its members to enable an ind

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The Standing Committee shall be entrusted not only with the task of ensuring timely
and effective compliance of the RBI instructions on customer service, but also that
of receiving the necessary feedback to determine that the action taken by various
departments of the bank is in tune with the spirit and intent of such instructions.
requirements.object: with the task of ensuring timely and effective compliance of the RBI instructions on customer service, but also that of receivin

requirements.full_sentence:

procedures prevalent in the RRB and take necessary corrective action.
requirements.object: basis, review the practice and procedures prevalent in the RRB and take necessary corrective action

requirements.full_sentence:

Service Committee of the Board on its performance during its tenure indicating, inter
alia, the areas reviewed, procedures/ practices identified and simplified / introduced.
requirements.object: periodically to the Customer Service Committee of the Board on its performance during its tenure indicating, inter alia, the are

requirements.full_sentence:
(5) The Standing Committee shall act as the bridge between the various departments
of the RRB and the Board / Customer Service Committees of the Board.
requirements.object: between the various departments of the RRB and the Board / Customer Service Committees of the Board

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall establish Customer Service Committees at branch level, which shall
also include their customers.
requirements.object: at branch level, which shall also include their customers

requirements.full_sentence:
Senior citizens, an important constituent in banks, shall also
be included therein.

The Branch Level Customer Service Committee shall meet at least once a month to
study complaints / suggestions, cases of delay, difficulties faced / reported by customers
/ members of the Committee and evolve ways and means of improving customer service.
requirements.object: a month to study complaints / suggestions, cases of delay, difficulties faced / reported by customers / members of the Committee an

requirements.full_sentence:
The Branch Level Committees shall submit quarterly reports giving inputs/
suggestions to the Standing Committee on Customer Service thus enabling the Standing
Committee to examine them and provide relevant feedback to the Customer Service
Committee of the Board for necessary policy/ procedural action.
requirements.object: inputs/ suggestions to the Standing Committee on Customer Service thus enabling the Standing Committee to examine them

requirements.full_sentence:

service and shall periodically assess these systems and their impact on customer service.
requirements.object: procedures towards providing better customer service and shall periodically assess these systems and their impact on customer s

requirements.full_sentence:

(1) Providing infrastructure facilities by branches by bestowing particular attention to
providing adequate space, proper furniture, drinking water facilities, with specific

The following non-cash transactions shall be undertaken by the RRB during the

(1) Non-voucher generating transactions:

requirements.object: on receipt of, and in accordance with, his / her instructions

However, the RRB may participate in credit-linked

conditions: In case of any fraud

if an RRB is convinced that an irregularity / fraud has been
committed by its staff towards any constituent
where the RRB is at fault

requirements.full_sentence:
Therefore, an
RRB is advised that:
(1) In case of any fraud, if an RRB is convinced that an irregularity / fraud has been
committed by its staff towards any constituent, the RRB shall at once acknowledge its
liability and pay the just claim,
(2) in cases where the RRB is at fault, it shall compensate customers without demur,
and
(3) in cases where neither the RRB is at fault nor the customer is at fault but the fault
lies elsewhere in the system, then also the RRB shall compensate the customers (up

if any, established and the

An RRB shall formulate / revise its customer relations policy with approval of its

unauthorised transactions in specified scenarios, i.e.

It

distribution across various categories of cases, viz., card present transactions, card not

requirements.full_sentence:

requirements.full_sentence:

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall
offer the following basic minimum facilities in a BSBD account, free of charge, without any
requirement of minimum balance to be maintained in such an account.
requirements.object: minimum facilities in a BSBD account, free of charge, without any requirement of minimum balance to be maintained in such an

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, no charges shall be levied towards
annual fee, either at the time of issuance or renewal.
requirements.object: fee, either at the time of issuance or renewal

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, issuance of a continuation
passbook, on exhaustion of the pages in the previous passbook, shall not attract
any charge.

Digital payment
transactions excluding ATM transactions, i.e., Point of Sale transfers, NEFT,
RTGS, UPI, IMPS, etc., shall not be counted as withdrawals for this purpose.
requirements.object: for this purpose

requirements.full_sentence:
The
charges on digital payment transactions shall be in accordance with guidelines
issued by Department of Payment and Settlement Systems, Reserve Bank /
National Payments Corporation of India / Government of India, as applicable.
requirements.object: guidelines issued by Department of Payment and Settlement Systems, Reserve Bank / National Payments Corporation of India / Gover

requirements.full_sentence:
The facilities of ATM / ATM-cum-Debit card or internet / mobile banking or cheque
book shall be offered to a customer provided he / she requests for the same, whether at
2 Replaced (paragraphs 137 to 143) with effect from April 1, 2026 vide Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Responsible Business Conduct) Amendment Directions, 2025 dated December 4, 2025
<image>
the time of opening the account or subsequently.
requirements.object: customer provided he / she requests for the same, whether at 2 Replaced (paragraphs 137 to 143) with effect from April 1, 2026 vide Re

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall not insist that a customer
necessarily avails these facilities while opening and/ or operating the BSBD account.
requirements.object: necessarily avails these facilities while opening and/ or operating the BSBD account

requirements.full_sentence:
In the case of existing BSBD accounts, an RRB shall extend the newly introduced
free facilities at clause (5) to (7) of paragraph 137 above upon receipt of a request from
the customer.
requirements.object: free facilities at clause (5) to (7) of paragraph 137 above upon receipt of a request from the customer

requirements.full_sentence:
The RRB shall facilitate existing BSBD account holders to submit such
requests through physical as well as digital channels.
requirements.object: holders to submit such requests through physical as well as digital channels

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB may provide additional facilities beyond the above minimum in a BSBD
account, with or without charges, in a non-discretionary and non-discriminatory manner
with transparent disclosure to the customer.
requirements.object: the above minimum in a BSBD account, with or without charges, in a non-discretionary and non-discriminatory manne

requirements.full_sentence:
However, while doing so, the RRB shall not
require the customer to maintain a minimum balance in the BSBD account.
requirements.object: maintain a minimum balance in the BSBD account

requirements.full_sentence:
The availment
of such additional facilities shall be at the option of the customer.
requirements.object: of the customer

requirements.full_sentence:
Opening and operation of BSBD accounts shall be subject to the instructions on
Know Your Customer / Anti Money Laundering issued by the Reserve Bank vide 'Reserve
Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Know Your Customer) Directions, 2025', as
amended from time to time.
requirements.object: instructions on Know Your Customer / Anti Money Laundering issued by the Reserve Bank vide 'Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Ba

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, BSBD accounts opened by or operated on behalf of
minors shall be subject to the instructions contained in paragraphs 229 to 234 below of
these Directions.
requirements.object: instructions contained in paragraphs 229 to 234 below of these Directions

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB, while opening a BSBD account, shall not impose any requirement of an
initial minimum deposit.
requirements.object: an initial minimum deposit

requirements.full_sentence: A customer may convert his / her existing savings bank account to a BSBD account.
requirements.object: existing savings bank account to a BSBD account

requirements.full_sentence:
The RRB shall convert the existing savings bank account to BSBD account within seven
days of receipt of request in writing from the customer for such conversion.
requirements.object: bank account to BSBD account within seven days of receipt of request in writing from the customer for such conversion

requirements.full_sentence:
Such an option
shall also be provided to customers through digital channels.
requirements.object: customers through digital channels

requirements.full_sentence:
The holder of a BSBD account shall not be eligible to open another BSBD account
in the same RRB or any other bank.
requirements.object: another BSBD account in the same RRB or any other bank

requirements.full_sentence:
Accordingly, before opening a new BSBD account
or converting an existing savings bank account to a BSBD account, the RRB shall obtain
a declaration from the customer that he / she does not have a BSBD account in any bank.
requirements.object: the customer that he / she does not have a BSBD account in any bank

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall publicise the availability of BSBD account and its features to
customers.
requirements.object: BSBD account and its features to customers

requirements.full_sentence:
The RRB shall also convey the differences between BSBD account and
<image>
various savings bank account variants offered by it when a customer approaches it to
open a deposit account
requirements.object: between BSBD account and <image> various savings bank account variants offered by it when a customer approaches it to open

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall take necessary steps to provide all existing ATMs / future ATMs with
ramps so that wheelchair users / persons with disabilities can easily access them.
requirements.object: provide all existing ATMs / future ATMs with ramps so that wheelchair users / persons with disabilities can easily access them

requirements.full_sentence:
Care
shall also be taken to make arrangements in such a way that the height of the ATMs does
not create an impediment in their use by wheelchair users.
requirements.object: make arrangements in such a way that the height of the ATMs does not create an impediment in their use by wheelchair users

conditions:
where it is
impracticable to provide such ramp facilities
requirements.full_sentence:
However, in cases where it is
impracticable to provide such ramp facilities, whether permanently fixed to earth or
otherwise, this requirement may be dispensed with, for reasons recorded and displayed
in branches or ATMs concerned.
requirements.object: reasons recorded and displayed in branches or ATMs concerned

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall also take appropriate steps, including providing of ramps at the
entrance of the branches, wherever feasible, so that the persons with disabilities /
wheelchair users can enter bank branches and conduct business without difficulty.
requirements.object: including providing of ramps at the entrance of the branches

requirements.full_sentence:
An
RRB shall report the progress made in this regard periodically to their respective
Customer Service Committee of the Board and ensure compliance.
requirements.object: in this regard periodically to their respective Customer Service Committee of the Board and ensure compliance

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall adhere to instructions given below and extend all banking facilities to
persons with blindness, low-vision and other disabilities.
requirements.object: below and extend all banking facilities to persons with blindness, low-vision and other disabilities

requirements.full_sentence:
(1) An RRB shall ensure that all banking facilities such as cheque book facility
including third party cheques, ATM facility, Net banking facility, locker facility, retail
loans, credit cards etc., are invariably offered to visually challenged persons
without any discrimination.
requirements.object: facilities such as cheque book facility including third party cheques, ATM facility, Net banking facility, locker facility, re

requirements.full_sentence: They shall be assisted in withdrawal of cash.
requirements.object: of cash

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) An RRB shall also advise its branches to render all possible assistance to the
visually challenged for availing the various banking facilities.
requirements.object: to render all possible assistance to the visually challenged for availing the various banking facilities

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) An RRB shall ensure that all its ATMs are Talking ATMs equipped with Braille
keypads.
requirements.object: ATMs are Talking ATMs equipped with Braille keypads

requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
(4) Magnifying glasses shall also be provided in all bank branches for the use of
persons with low vision, wherever they require for carrying out banking
transactions with ease.
requirements.object: all bank branches for the use of persons with low vision

requirements.full_sentence:
The branches should display a notice at a prominent place
about the availability of magnifying glasses and other facilities available for
persons with disabilities.
requirements.object: a prominent place about the availability of magnifying glasses and other facilities available for persons with disabilities

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall extend the following facilities to account holders who are old / sick /
incapacitated and who are willing to open and operate joint accounts.
requirements.object: to account holders who are old / sick / incapacitated and who are willing to open and operate joint accounts

requirements.full_sentence:
With a view to enabling the old / sick account holders operate their bank accounts,
an RRB shall follow the procedure as under:
(1) Wherever thumb or toe impression of the sick / old / incapacitated account holder
is obtained, it shall be identified by two independent witnesses known to the RRB,
one of whom shall be a responsible official of the RRB.
requirements.object: under: (1) Wherever thumb or toe impression of the sick / old / incapacitated account holder is obtained, it shall be identifi

conditions:
Where the customer cannot even put his / her thumb impression and also would
not be able to be physically present in the RRB
requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Where the customer cannot even put his / her thumb impression and also would
not be able to be physically present in the RRB, a mark can be obtained on the
cheque / withdrawal form which shall be identified by two independent witnesses,
one of whom shall be a responsible official of the RRB.
requirements.object: independent witnesses, one of whom shall be a responsible official of the RRB

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The customer may also be asked to indicate to the RRB as to who would withdraw
the amount from the RRB on the basis of cheque / withdrawal form as obtained
above and that person shall be identified by two independent witnesses.
requirements.object: independent witnesses

requirements.full_sentence:
The
<image>
person who would be actually drawing the money from the RRB shall be asked to
furnish his / her signature to the RRB.
requirements.object: his / her signature to the RRB

requirements.full_sentence:
Opinion obtained by the Indian Banks' Association from their consultant on the
question of opening of a bank account of a person who has lost both his hands and could
not sign the cheque / withdrawal form is given below:
"In terms of the General Clauses Act, the term "Sign" with its grammatical variations and
cognate expressions, shall with reference to a person who is unable to write his name,
include "mark" with its grammatical variations and cognate expressions.
requirements.object: person who is unable to write his name, include "mark" with its grammatical variations and cognate expressions

requirements.full_sentence:
The Supreme
Court has held in AIR 1950 - Supreme Court, 265 that there must be physical contact
between the person who is to sign and the signature can be by means of a mark.
requirements.object: the person who is to sign and the signature can be by means of a mark

requirements.full_sentence:
The RRB
shall undertake appropriate measures to ensure compliance with the above Supreme
Court Order, as applicable.
requirements.object: ensure compliance with the above Supreme Court Order, as applicable

requirements.full_sentence:
The following instructions shall be applicable for the purpose of opening / operating
bank accounts of the above persons:
<image>
(1) The National Trust for Welfare of Persons with Autism, Cerebral Palsy, Mental
Retardation and Multiple Disabilities Act, 1999 provides a law relating to certain
specified disabilities.
requirements.object: purpose of opening / operating bank accounts of the above persons: <image> (1) The National Trust for Welfare of Persons with Au

requirements.full_sentence:
This
Act empowers a Local Level Committee to appoint a guardian, to a person with
disabilities, who shall have the care of the person and property of the disabled
person.
requirements.object: the person and property of the disabled person

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) An RRB shall take note of the legal position stated above and shall rely on and be
guided by the orders / certificates issued by the competent authority, under the
respective Acts, appointing guardians / managers for the purposes of opening /
operating bank accounts.
requirements.object: legal position stated above and shall rely on and be guided by the orders / certificates issued by the competent authority, under the

conditions: In case of doubt
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of doubt, care may be taken to obtain proper
legal advice.
requirements.object: proper legal advice

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall ensure that its branches give proper guidance to their customers so
that the guardians / managers of the disabled persons do not face any difficulties in this
regard.
requirements.object: give proper guidance to their customers so that the guardians / managers of the disabled persons do not face any difficulties
display in a conspicuous place the following information in the local language and English / Hindi (or both): (1) essential d

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall put in place appropriate mechanism with the following specific
provisions for meeting the needs of senior citizen and differently abled customers so that
they are able to avail the RRB's services without difficulty.
requirements.object: mechanism with the following specific provisions for meeting the needs of senior citizen and differently abled customers so t

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall provide a clearly identifiable dedicated counter or a counter which
provides priority to senior citizens and people who are differently abled including visually
impaired persons.
requirements.object: dedicated counter or a counter which provides priority to senior citizens and people who are differently abled includin

conditions: when a Life Certificate is submitted in any branch
requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall ensure that when a Life Certificate is submitted in any branch,
including a non-home branch, of the pension paying bank, the same is updated / uploaded
promptly in CBS by the receiving branch itself, to avoid any delay in credit of pension.
requirements.object: Life Certificate is submitted in any branch, including a non-home branch, of the pension paying bank, the same is updated / uploade

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall issue cheque books to customers, whenever a request is received,
through a requisition slip which is part of the cheque book issued earlier.
requirements.object: customers

conditions: if requested
requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall provide minimum 25 cheque leaves every year, if requested, in
savings bank account, free of charge.
requirements.object: leaves every year

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall not insist on physical presence of any customer including senior
citizens and differently abled persons for getting cheque books.
requirements.object: of any customer including senior citizens and differently abled persons for getting cheque books

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall issue cheque books, on requisition, by any other mode as per the
bank's laid down policy.
requirements.object: requisition, by any other mode as per the bank's laid down policy

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall convert a fully KYC compliant account automatically into a 'Senior
Citizen Account' based on the date of birth available in the RRB's records.
requirements.object: compliant account automatically into a 'Senior Citizen Account' based on the date of birth available in the RRB's records

requirements.full_sentence:
The facilities provided to sick / old / incapacitated persons vide paragraphs 147 to
149 of these directions by an RRB (regarding operations of accounts through
identification of thumb / toe impression / mark by two independent witnesses and
authorising a person who would withdraw the amount on behalf of such customers) shall
also be extended to the visually impaired customers.
requirements.object: the visually impaired customers

conditions: where applicable
requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall provide senior citizens and differently abled persons Form 15G/H once
in a year (preferably in April) to enable them to submit the same, where applicable, within
the stipulated time.
requirements.object: differently abled persons Form 15G/H once in a year (preferably in April) to enable them to submit the same

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall make concerted efforts to offer certain basic banking services, such
as pick up of cash and instruments against receipt, delivery of cash against withdrawal
from account, delivery of demand drafts, submission of Know Your Customer (KYC)
documents and Life certificate at the premises/ residence of senior citizens of more than
<image>
70 years of age and differently abled persons or infirm persons (having medically certified
chronic illness or disability) including those who are visually impaired.
requirements.object: offer certain basic banking services, such as pick up of cash and instruments against receipt, delivery of cash against with

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall incorporate the following aspects in their Board approved policy for
such services and report the progress made in this regard to the Customer Service
Committee of the Board every quarter:
(1) An RRB shall offer the doorstep banking services on pan India basis.
requirements.object: in their Board approved policy for such services and report the progress made in this regard to the Customer Service

requirements.full_sentence:
The RRB
shall develop a Board approved framework for determining the nature of branches
/ centres where these services will be provided mandatorily and those where it will
be provided on a best effort basis and make the policy public.
requirements.object: framework for determining the nature of branches / centres where these services will be provided mandatorily and those where

requirements.full_sentence:
The list of branches
offering such doorstep banking services shall be displayed / updated on the bank's
website regularly.
requirements.object: on the bank's website regularly

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) An RRB shall give adequate publicity to the availability of these services in their
public awareness campaigns.
requirements.object: the availability of these services in their public awareness campaigns

requirements.full_sentence:
The charges, in this regard, shall also be
prominently indicated in brochures and published in its website.
requirements.object: in brochures and published in its website

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank may operate their calamity affected branches from temporary premises
under advice to the concerned Regional Office of RBI.
requirements.object: branches from temporary premises under advice to the concerned Regional Office of RBI

requirements.full_sentence:
For continuing the temporary
premise beyond 30 days, banks may obtain specific approval from the respective
Regional Office of RBI.
requirements.object: the respective Regional Office of RBI

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall also make arrangements to render banking services
in the affected areas by setting up satellite offices, extension counters or mobile banking
facilities etc.
requirements.object: render banking services in the affected areas by setting up satellite offices, extension counters or mobile banking faciliti

requirements.full_sentence: A bank shall take immediate action for restoration of ATM services at the earliest.
requirements.object: restoration of ATM services at the earliest

requirements.full_sentence:
During the period, it shall provide alternative arrangements to address the immediate
cash requirements of the affected areas.
requirements.object: address the immediate cash requirements of the affected areas

requirements.full_sentence:
Persons displaced or adversely affected by a calamity may not have access to
their identification and personal records.
requirements.object: identification and personal records

requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
the Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Know Your Customer) Directions,
2025, may be opened by banks.

conditions:
where a calamity has been
declared
requirements.full_sentence:
A bank at its discretion, may provide relief measures such as waiver / reduction of
various fees and charges in respect of customers in the areas where a calamity has been
declared, for a period not exceeding one year.]
requirements.object: as waiver / reduction of various fees and charges in respect of customers in the areas where a calamity has been declared

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall ensure that demand drafts of ₹20,000 and above are issued invariably
with account payee crossing.
requirements.object: of ₹20,000 and above are issued invariably with account payee crossing

requirements.full_sentence:
Necessary changes in system and procedures to speed up issue and payment of
drafts should be taken.

Measures seeking to bring down the incidence of frauds perpetrated through bank
drafts shall be built into the draft form itself.
requirements.object: draft form itself

requirements.full_sentence:
All superscriptions about validity of the demand draft shall be provided at the top of
the draft form.
requirements.object: top of the draft form

requirements.full_sentence:
A draft shall be uniformly valid for a period of three months and procedure
for revalidation after three months shall be simplified.
requirements.object: a period of three months and procedure for revalidation after three months shall be simplified

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall ensure that drafts of small amounts are issued by its branches against
cash to all customers irrespective of the fact whether they are having accounts with the
RRB or not.
requirements.object: small amounts are issued by its branches against cash to all customers irrespective of the fact whether they are having accounts

requirements.full_sentence:
Staff at the RRB branch counter shall not refuse to accept small denomination
notes from the customers (or non-customers for issuance of the drafts).
requirements.object: denomination notes from the customers (or non-customers for issuance of the drafts)

requirements.full_sentence: An RRB shall ensure that drafts drawn on its branches are paid immediately.
requirements.object: on its branches are paid immediately

requirements.full_sentence:
Payment of draft shall not be refused for the only reason that relative advice has not been
received.
requirements.object: only reason that relative advice has not been received

requirements.full_sentence:
Duplicate draft, in lieu of lost draft, up to and including ₹5,000 may be issued to the
purchaser on the basis of adequate indemnity and without insistence on seeking non
payment advice from drawee office irrespective of the legal position obtaining in this
regard.
requirements.object: purchaser on the basis of adequate indemnity and without insistence on seeking non payment advice from drawee office irrespective of

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall issue duplicate Demand Draft to the customer within a fortnight from
the receipt of such request.
requirements.object: to the customer within a fortnight from the receipt of such request

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, for the delay beyond this stipulated period, an RRB
shall pay interest at the rate applicable for term deposit of corresponding maturity in order
to compensate the customer for such delay.
requirements.object: rate applicable for term deposit of corresponding maturity in order to compensate the customer for such delay

requirements.full_sentence:
The above instructions shall be applicable only in cases where the request for
duplicate demand draft is made by the purchaser or the beneficiary and would not be
applicable in the case of draft endorsed to third parties.
requirements.object: cases where the request for duplicate demand draft is made by the purchaser or the beneficiary and would not be applicable in th

requirements.full_sentence:
The cheque collection policy should be integrated with the deposit policy formulated
by the RRB in line with the model deposit policy of Indian Banks' Association or
Association of which it is a member.
requirements.object: deposit policy formulated by the RRB in line with the model deposit policy of Indian Banks' Association or Association of which

requirements.full_sentence:
The policy should clearly lay down the liability of an RRB by way of interest payments
due to delays for non-compliance with the standards set by the RRB itself.
requirements.object: liability of an RRB by way of interest payments due to delays for non-compliance with the standards set by the RRB itself

conditions: where necessary
requirements.full_sentence:
Compensation by way of interest payment, where necessary, should be made
without any claim from the customer.
requirements.object: claim from the customer

requirements.full_sentence:
Adequate care may be taken to ensure that the interests of the small depositors are
fully protected.
requirements.object: that the interests of the small depositors are fully protected

requirements.full_sentence:
The policy should be placed before the Board of the RRB and the Board's specific
approval should be obtained on the reasonableness of the policy and the compliance with
the spirit of the Reserve Bank's instructions.
requirements.object: Board of the RRB and the Board's specific approval should be obtained on the reasonableness of the policy and the compliance with

requirements.full_sentence: All cheque forms shall be printed in Hindi and English.
requirements.object: and English

requirements.full_sentence:
The customer may, however,
write cheques in Hindi, English or in the concerned regional language.
requirements.object: in Hindi, English or in the concerned regional language

requirements.full_sentence:
Accordingly, cheques bearing date in Hindi as per the National Calendar (Saka Samvat)
shall, therefore, be accepted by an RRB for payment, if otherwise in order.
requirements.object: by an RRB for payment

requirements.full_sentence:
Both the drop box facility and the facility for acknowledgement of the cheques at
regular collection counters shall be available to the customers and no branch shall refuse
to give an acknowledgement if the customer tenders the cheques at the counters.
requirements.object: customers and no branch shall refuse to give an acknowledgement if the customer tenders the cheques at the counters

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall ensure that customers are not compelled to drop the cheques in the
drop-box.
requirements.object: not compelled to drop the cheques in the drop-box

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the RRB shall invariably display on the cheque drop-box itself that
"Customers can also tender the cheques at the counter and obtain acknowledgment on
the pay-in-slips".
requirements.object: cheque drop-box itself that "Customers can also tender the cheques at the counter and obtain acknowledgment on the pay-in-sl

requirements.full_sentence:
The above message is required to be displayed in English, Hindi and
the concerned regional language of the State.
requirements.object: English, Hindi and the concerned regional language of the State

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall make fool proof arrangements to account for the number of
instruments each time the box is opened so that there are no disputes and the customer's
interests are not compromised.
requirements.object: to account for the number of instruments each time the box is opened so that there are no disputes and the customer's int

requirements.full_sentence:
While RRBs shall not collect account payee cheques for any person other than the
payee constituents, it is clarified that an RRB collecting instruments drawn in the name of
'Karta' to the account of the HUF is not prohibited.
requirements.object: for any person other than the payee constituents, it is clarified that an RRB collecting instruments drawn in the name o

requirements.full_sentence:
However, an RRB shall, take a
mandate from the accountholder at the time of opening an account in the name of HUF,
that the cheques drawn in favour of the Karta can also be collected in the account and
vice-versa.
requirements.object: from the accountholder at the time of opening an account in the name of HUF, that the cheques drawn in favour of the Karta can also b

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, an RRB may also take such other precautions as they deem fit to
ensure that the cheques drawn in favour of 'Karta' really pertain to the account of HUF
before crediting the same to the HUF account.
requirements.object: precautions as they deem fit to ensure that the cheques drawn in favour of 'Karta' really pertain to the account of HUF before cr

requirements.full_sentence:
Whenever clearing is suspended and it is apprehended that the suspension may be
prolonged, bank may temporarily accommodate its constituents, both borrowers and
depositors, to the extent possible by purchasing the local cheques, drafts, etc., deposited
in their accounts for collection, special consideration being shown in respect of cheques
drawn by Government departments/companies of good standing and repute, as also
demand drafts drawn on local banks.
requirements.object: temporarily accommodate its constituents, both borrowers and depositors, to the extent possible by purchasing the local cheques

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall return/ despatch the dishonoured instruments to the customer
promptly without delay, in any case within 24 hours.
requirements.object: instruments to the customer promptly without delay, in any case within 24 hours

requirements.full_sentence:
In relation to cheques presented direct to the paying bank for settlement of
transaction by way of transfer between two accounts with that bank, it should return such
dishonoured cheques to payees / holders immediately.
requirements.object: to payees / holders immediately

conditions: In case of dishonor / return of cheques
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of dishonor / return of cheques, the paying bank should clearly indicate the
return reason code on the return memo / objection slip which should also bear the
<image>
signature / initial of an RRB official as prescribed in Rule 6 of the Uniform Regulations
and Rules for Bankers' Clearing Houses (URRBCH).
requirements.object: reason code on the return memo / objection slip which should also bear the <image> signature / initial of an RRB official

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall put in place an appropriate policy approved
by the Board or its Committee taking into consideration the need to prevent misuse of the
cheque drawing facility and avoid penalising customers for unintended dishonour of
cheques.
requirements.object: appropriate policy approved by the Board or its Committee taking into consideration the need to prevent misuse of the cheque drawing f

requirements.full_sentence:
This policy shall be transparent, made known to every customer upfront and
implemented fairly.
requirements.object: to every customer upfront and implemented fairly

requirements.full_sentence:
The policy shall also cover inherent preventive measures and checks to prevent any
scope for collusion of the staff of the RRB or any other person, with the drawer of the
cheque for causing delay in or withholding the communication of the fact of dishonour of
the cheque to the payee / holder or the return of such dishonoured cheque to him / her.
requirements.object: measures and checks to prevent any scope for collusion of the staff of the RRB or any other person, with the drawer of

requirements.full_sentence:
The RRB shall also lay down requisite internal guidelines for its officers and staff and
advise them to adhere to such guidelines and ensure strict compliance thereof to achieve
aforesaid object of effective communication and delivery of dishonoured cheque to the
payee.
requirements.object: internal guidelines for its officers and staff and advise them to adhere to such guidelines and ensure strict compliance there

requirements.full_sentence:
The policy shall also deal with frequent dishonour of cheques of value of less than
₹1 crore and ECS / NACH mandates.
requirements.object: dishonour of cheques of value of less than ₹1 crore and ECS / NACH mandates

requirements.full_sentence:
Data in respect of each dishonoured cheque for amount of ₹1 crore and above shall
be made part of the RRB's MIS on constituents and concerned branches shall report such
data to their respective Regional Office / Head Office.

of accounts as prescribed in the Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Know

requirements.full_sentence:

(3) The policy on penal charges to be so levied may be decided with the approval of

requirements.object: approval of the Board of the RRB

(4) The penal charges shall be directly proportionate to the extent of shortfall

In other words, the charges shall be a fixed percentage levied on the

The cost of providing such passbooks shall not be recovered from

An RRB shall mention the complete address and telephone number of the branch

Debit entries

Paper tokens, indicating the date of receipt of the passbook and also the date when

An RRB shall exercise the following precautions to obviate fraudulent withdrawals

(2) Passbooks retained at the branches overnight shall be held under lock and key in

requirements.object: customers as well as bank branches expeditiously

provided that the period and the aggregate amount of the deposit

requirements.object: aggregate amount of the deposit do not undergo any change

requirements.object: of impending due date of maturity well in advance to their depositors as a rule in order to extend better customer service

requirements.full_sentence:
However, the signatures of both the depositors may have to be obtained, in

An RRB shall provide TDS Certificate in Form 16A, to its customers in respect of

<image>

where a term deposit account(s) of a depositor is frozen by an RRB on the

customers as contained in Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Know Your
Customer) Directions, 2025.

Minors of any age may be allowed to open and operate savings and term deposit
accounts through his/ her natural or legal guardian.
requirements.object: and operate savings and term deposit accounts through his/ her natural or legal guardian

requirements.full_sentence:
They may also be allowed to open
such accounts with mother as guardian in terms of instructions issued on December 29,
1976, whose contents are reproduced below:
It has been brought to our notice that considerable difficulty is being experienced by
women customers in opening bank accounts in the names of minors, with mothers as
their guardians.

requirements.full_sentence:
Presumably, RRBs are reluctant to accept the mother as a guardian of
a minor, while father is alive in view of section 6 of the Hindu Minority and Guardianship
Act, 1956, which stipulates that the father alone should be deemed to be the guardian
in such case.
requirements.object: the guardian in such case

requirements.full_sentence:
To overcome this legal difficulty and to enable RRBs to open freely such
accounts in the name of minors under the guardianship of their mothers, it has been
suggested in some quarters that the above provisions should be suitably amended.

<image>
While it is true that an amendment of the above Act may overcome the difficulty in the
case of Hindus, it will not solve the problem for other communities as minors belonging
to Muslim, Christian, Parsi Communities would still be left out unless the laws governing
these communities are also likewise amended.
requirements.object: the case of Hindus, it will not solve the problem for other communities as minors belonging to Muslim, Christian, Parsi Com

We shall
therefore, be glad if you will kindly apprise all your branches of the position as stated

as guardians to be opened, whenever such requests are received by them, subject to
the safeguards mentioned above.

if they so

desire, and such terms shall be duly conveyed to the account holder.

requirements.object: on record

conditions:
if the account is
operated by the guardian

Moreover, if the account is
operated by the guardian, the balance shall be got confirmed.

action, including communicating these requirements to minor account holders attaining
the age of majority, to ensure fulfilment of these requirements.
requirements.object: communicating these requirements to minor account holders attaining the age of majority, to ensure fulfilment of these

where there is
no explicit mandate to renew the term deposit

if no

alert messages shall invariably mention that the account would become 'inoperative' if no

In case the account holder still
fails to operate the account within the extended period, an RRB shall classify the said
account as inoperative account after the expiry of the extended period.
requirements.object: as inoperative account after the expiry of the extended period

requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of classifying an account as 'inoperative', only customer induced
transactions and not bank induced transactions shall be considered.

There may be
instances where the customer has given a mandate like Standing Instructions (SI) / auto-

These transactions shall also be treated as customer induced

The classification of an account as inoperative shall be for a particular account of

multiple accounts / deposits with a bank

opening of the account, segregate the aforementioned accounts in its CBS, so that the

accounts, while allowing operations in these accounts, an RRB shall exercise due

The segregation of inoperative accounts is required to be done to reduce the risk of

contact the nominee, if registered, for tracing the customer.

have in place adequate operational safeguards to ensure that the claimants in case of
inoperative accounts / unclaimed deposits are genuine.
requirements.object: operational safeguards to ensure that the claimants in case of inoperative accounts / unclaimed deposits are genuine

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall process requests
for activation of inoperative account / unclaimed deposits within three working days from
the receipt of the complete application.
requirements.object: of inoperative account / unclaimed deposits within three working days from the receipt of the complete application

requirements.full_sentence:
Interest on savings accounts shall be credited on a regular basis irrespective of the
fact that the account is in operation or not.
requirements.object: regular basis irrespective of the fact that the account is in operation or not

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall not levy penal charges for non-maintenance of minimum balances in
any account that is classified as an inoperative account.
requirements.object: non-maintenance of minimum balances in any account that is classified as an inoperative account

requirements.full_sentence: No charges shall be levied for activation of inoperative accounts.
requirements.object: of inoperative accounts

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall host the details of unclaimed deposits {only name, address (without
pin code) and Unclaimed Deposit Reference Number (UDRN)}, which have been
transferred to DEA Fund of RBI on its website, which shall be updated regularly, at least
on a monthly basis.
requirements.object: unclaimed deposits {only name, address (without pin code) and Unclaimed Deposit Reference Number (UDRN)}, which have been transfer

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB which does not have its own website shall make available
the above list of unclaimed deposits in its branches.
requirements.object: list of unclaimed deposits in its branches

requirements.full_sentence:
The database hosted on the website
shall provide a search option to enable the public to search for their unclaimed deposits
using name in combination with the address of the account holder / entity.
requirements.object: to enable the public to search for their unclaimed deposits using name in combination with the address of the account holder /

requirements.full_sentence:
Upon a
successful search, details of unclaimed deposits shall be displayed in a format comprising
account holder's name(s), his / her address (without pincode) and UDRN only.
requirements.object: format comprising account holder's name(s), his / her address (without pincode) and UDRN only

requirements.full_sentence:
In case
such accounts are not in the name of individuals, the search input and result should
include names of individuals authorised to operate the accounts.
requirements.object: authorised to operate the accounts

requirements.full_sentence:
However, the account
number, its type, outstanding balance and the name of the branch shall not be disclosed
on the bank's website.
requirements.object: bank's website

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall not allow any debit transaction in an inoperative account unless there
is a customer induced activation as per the procedure mentioned in paragraphs 247 to
requirements.object: in an inoperative account unless there is a customer induced activation as per the procedure mentioned in paragraphs 247 t

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, an RRB may also consider imposing a cooling-off period on reactivation,
with restrictions on the number and amount of transactions, as may be applicable for
newly opened accounts with the bank.
requirements.object: cooling-off period on reactivation, with restrictions on the number and amount of transactions, as may be applicable for newl

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall ensure that there is no unauthorised access to customer data
pertaining to the inoperative accounts.
requirements.object: no unauthorised access to customer data pertaining to the inoperative accounts

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall also ensure that adequate steps are
taken to prevent data theft and related misuse for fraudulent purposes.
requirements.object: steps are taken to prevent data theft and related misuse for fraudulent purposes

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall provide on its website as well as at its branches, the information on
<image>
the process for activation of the inoperative account / unclaimed deposits and claiming
the balances therein.
requirements.object: as well as at its branches, the information on <image> the process for activation of the inoperative account / unclaimed deposi

requirements.full_sentence:
Necessary claim forms and documents may be made available for
the benefit of customers.
requirements.object: the benefit of customers

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall conduct public awareness and financial literacy campaigns regularly
to educate the members of public about the activation of inoperative accounts / unclaimed
deposits and the prescribed procedure to claim amounts lying therein by a depositor or
his / her nominee / legal heir in case of deceased depositor.
requirements.object: financial literacy campaigns regularly to educate the members of public about the activation of inoperative accounts / un

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall put in place a comprehensive revised Board approved policy and
SOPs on safe deposit locker facility / safe custody article as per the instructions
mentioned herein.
requirements.object: comprehensive revised Board approved policy and SOPs on safe deposit locker facility / safe custody article as per the instructions men

requirements.full_sentence:
The existing customers of an RRB who have made an application for locker facility
and who are fully compliant with the CDD criteria under the Reserve Bank of India
(Regional Rural Banks - Know Your Customer) Directions, 2025 may be given the
facilities of safe deposit lockers / safe custody article subject to on-going compliance.
requirements.object: of safe deposit lockers / safe custody article subject to on-going compliance

requirements.full_sentence:
Customers who are not having any other banking relationship with the RRB may be
given the facilities of safe deposit locker / safe custody article after complying with the
CDD criteria under the Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Know Your
Customer) Directions, 2025 and subject to on-going compliance.
requirements.object: of safe deposit locker / safe custody article after complying with the CDD criteria under the Reserve Bank of India (Regional

requirements.full_sentence:
The due diligence shall
be carried out for all the customers in whatever rights and capacities they may be hiring
the locker.
requirements.object: all the customers in whatever rights and capacities they may be hiring the locker

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall incorporate a clause in the locker agreement that the locker-hirer/s
shall not keep anything illegal or any hazardous substance in the Safe Deposit locker.
requirements.object: any hazardous substance in the Safe Deposit locker

requirements.full_sentence:
If
the bank suspects the deposit of any illegal or hazardous substance by any customer in
the safe deposit locker, the RRB shall have the right to take appropriate action against
such customer as it deems fit and proper in the circumstances.
requirements.object: take appropriate action against such customer as it deems fit and proper in the circumstances

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall obtain recent passport size photographs of locker-hirer(s) and
individual(s) authorised by locker hirer(s) to operate the locker and preserve in the records
pertaining to locker-hirer being maintained in the RRB's branch.
requirements.object: photographs of locker-hirer(s) and individual(s) authorised by locker hirer(s) to operate the locker and preserve in the r

requirements.full_sentence:
In order to facilitate customers making informed choices, an RRB shall maintain a
branch wise list of vacant lockers as well as a waitlist in Core Banking System (CBS) or
any other computerised system compliant with Cyber Security Framework issued by RBI,
for the purpose of allotment of lockers and ensure transparency in allotment of lockers.
requirements.object: list of vacant lockers as well as a waitlist in Core Banking System (CBS) or any other computerised system compliant with Cyber

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall acknowledge the receipt of all applications for allotment of locker and
provide a waitlist number to the customers, if the lockers are not available for allotment.
requirements.object: all applications for allotment of locker and provide a waitlist number to the customers

requirements.full_sentence: An RRB shall have a Board approved agreement for safe deposit lockers.
requirements.object: agreement for safe deposit lockers

requirements.full_sentence:
For this
purpose, an RRB may adopt the model locker agreement framed by Indian Banks'
Association.
requirements.object: agreement framed by Indian Banks' Association

requirements.full_sentence:
The agreement shall be in conformity with these instructions and the
directions of the Hon'ble Supreme Court in the matter of 'Amitabha Dasgupta vs United
Bank of India' (Judgment dated February 19, 2021 in CA No.
requirements.object: these instructions and the directions of the Hon'ble Supreme Court in the matter of 'Amitabha Dasgupta vs United Bank of India'

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall
ensure that any unfair terms or conditions are not incorporated in their locker agreements.
requirements.object: terms or conditions are not incorporated in their locker agreements

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the terms of the contract shall not be more onerous than required in ordinary
course of business to safeguard the interests of the RRB.
requirements.object: required in ordinary course of business to safeguard the interests of the RRB

requirements.full_sentence:
At the time of allotment of the locker to a customer, an RRB shall enter into an
agreement with the customer to whom the locker facility is provided, on a paper duly
stamped.
requirements.object: with the customer to whom the locker facility is provided, on a paper duly stamped

requirements.full_sentence:
A copy of the locker agreement in duplicate signed by both the parties shall be
furnished to the locker-hirer to know his / her rights and responsibilities.
requirements.object: locker-hirer to know his / her rights and responsibilities

requirements.full_sentence:
Original
Agreement shall be retained with the RRB's branch where the locker is situated.
requirements.object: RRB's branch where the locker is situated

requirements.full_sentence:
There may be instances, where the agreements already executed by an RRB with
its locker-hirer(s) are at variance with the Indian Banks' Association Model Agreement.

In
such cases, all the provisions contained in this section, in particular paragraphs 297 to
299 on compensation policy / liability of RRBs, shall continue to apply to them even if not
explicitly stated in the agreements already executed.
requirements.object: them even if not explicitly stated in the agreements already executed

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, in such cases, the RRB
<image>
shall have the option to execute fresh agreements or revise them through supplementary
agreements.
requirements.object: execute fresh agreements or revise them through supplementary agreements

requirements.full_sentence: The cost of stamp paper in such cases shall be borne by the RRB.
requirements.object: RRB

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB may face potential situations where the locker-hirer neither operates the
locker nor pays the rent.
requirements.object: the locker-hirer neither operates the locker nor pays the rent

requirements.full_sentence:
The RRB, however,
shall not insist on such term deposits from the existing locker holders or those who have
satisfactory operative account.
requirements.object: deposits from the existing locker holders or those who have satisfactory operative account

conditions: If locker rent is collected in advance
requirements.full_sentence:
If locker rent is collected in advance, in the event of surrender of a locker by a
customer, the proportionate amount of advance rent collected shall be refunded to the
customer.
requirements.object: customer

conditions:
If there is any event such as merger / closure / shifting of branch warranting physical
relocation of the lockers
requirements.full_sentence:
If there is any event such as merger / closure / shifting of branch warranting physical
relocation of the lockers, an RRB shall give public notice in two newspapers (including
one local daily in vernacular language) in this regard and the customers shall be intimated
at least two months in advance along with options for them to change or close the facility.
requirements.object: two newspapers (including one local daily in vernacular language) in this regard and the customers shall be intimated at least t

conditions:
In case of unplanned shifting due to natural calamities or any other such emergency
situation
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of unplanned shifting due to natural calamities or any other such emergency
situation, an RRB shall make efforts to intimate its customers suitably at the earliest.
requirements.object: its customers suitably at the earliest

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall take necessary steps to ensure that the area in which the locker facility
is housed is properly secured to prevent criminal break-ins.
requirements.object: ensure that the area in which the locker facility is housed is properly secured to prevent criminal break-ins

requirements.full_sentence:
The risks of accessibility of
an allotted locker from any side without involvement of the locker-hirer concerned may be
<image>
assessed and kept on record.
requirements.object: kept on record

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall have a single defined point of entry and exit
to the locker room / vault.
requirements.object: point of entry and exit to the locker room / vault

requirements.full_sentence:
The place where the lockers are housed must be secured
enough to protect against hazard of rain / flood water entering and damaging the lockers
in contingent situations.
requirements.object: protect against hazard of rain / flood water entering and damaging the lockers in contingent situations

requirements.full_sentence:
The fire hazard risks of the area should also be assessed and
minimised.
requirements.object: minimised

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB, as per its policy, shall conduct necessary engineering / safety
verification regularly to identify the risks and carry out necessary rectification.
requirements.object: safety verification regularly to identify the risks and carry out necessary rectification

requirements.full_sentence: The area housing the lockers shall remain adequately guarded at all times.
requirements.object: all times

conditions: if required as per its risk assessment
requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB
shall install Access Control system, if required as per its risk assessment, which would
restrict any unauthorised entry and create digital record of access to locker room with
time log.

As per its internal security policy, the RRB may cover the entry and exit of the
strong room and the common areas of operation under CCTV camera and preserve its
recording for a period of not less than 180 days.
requirements.object: exit of the strong room and the common areas of operation under CCTV camera and preserve its recording for a period of not less th

conditions:
In case any customer has complained to
the bank that his / her locker is opened without his / her knowledge and authority
requirements.full_sentence:
In case any customer has complained to
the bank that his / her locker is opened without his / her knowledge and authority, or any
theft or security breach is noticed / observed, the RRB shall preserve the CCTV recording
till the police investigation is completed and the dispute is settled.
requirements.object: till the police investigation is completed and the dispute is settled

requirements.full_sentence:
The security procedures shall be well documented and the staff concerned shall be
properly trained in the procedure.
requirements.object: the staff concerned shall be properly trained in the procedure

requirements.full_sentence:
The internal auditors shall verify and report the
compliance to ensure that the procedures are strictly adhered to.
requirements.object: compliance to ensure that the procedures are strictly adhered to

requirements.full_sentence:
All the new mechanical lockers to be installed by an RRB shall conform to basic
standards / benchmarks for safety and security as prescribed by Bureau of Indian
Standards (BIS) or any other enhanced industry standards applicable in this regard.
requirements.object: / benchmarks for safety and security as prescribed by Bureau of Indian Standards (BIS) or any other enhanced industry stand

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB offering electronically accessed lockers should be fully aware of the safety
and security features of such lockers satisfying appropriate industry standards.
requirements.object: the safety and security features of such lockers satisfying appropriate industry standards

requirements.full_sentence:
In case
the lockers are being operated through an electronic system, an RRB shall take
reasonable steps to ensure that the system is protected against hacking or any breach of
security.
requirements.object: ensure that the system is protected against hacking or any breach of security

requirements.full_sentence:
The customers' personal data, including their biometric data, shall not be shared
with third parties without their consent.
requirements.object: parties without their consent

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, an RRB shall ensure that the
electronically operated lockers are compliant with the Cyber Security Framework
prescribed by the Reserve Bank.
requirements.object: operated lockers are compliant with the Cyber Security Framework prescribed by the Reserve Bank

requirements.full_sentence:
The system shall be capable of maintaining unalterable
<image>
log of locker activities.
requirements.object: unalterable <image> log of locker activities

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall comply with the relevant statutory / regulatory
instructions / requirements applicable for IT / data protection.
requirements.object: statutory / regulatory instructions / requirements applicable for IT / data protection

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, an RRB shall also
devise a standard operating procedure for issue of new password in lieu of lost passwords
to customers in a safe and secure manner in case of electronically operated lockers.
requirements.object: operating procedure for issue of new password in lieu of lost passwords to customers in a safe and secure manner in case of ele

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall ensure that identification Code of the RRB / branch is embossed on
all the locker keys with a view to facilitating identification of lockers / locker ownership by
law enforcement agencies in case of need.
requirements.object: of the RRB / branch is embossed on all the locker keys with a view to facilitating identification of lockers / locker

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the custodian of the locker shall,
regularly / periodically, check the keys maintained in the branch to ensure that they are
in proper condition.
requirements.object: check the keys maintained in the branch to ensure that they are in proper condition

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall permit the locker-hirer to operate the locker only with
the key provided by the RRB, although there is no restriction in allowing the customer to
use an additional padlock of her / his own if there are such provisions in lockers.
requirements.object: operate the locker only with the key provided by the RRB, although there is no restriction in allowing the customer to use

requirements.full_sentence:
The locker hirer and / or the persons duly authorised by him / her only shall be
permitted to operate the locker after proper verification of their identity and recording of
the authorisation by the officials concerned of the RRB.
requirements.object: the locker after proper verification of their identity and recording of the authorisation by the officials concerned of the RR

requirements.full_sentence:
The RRB shall maintain a record
of all individuals, including the locker-hirers, who have accessed the lockers and the date
and time (both check-in and check-out time) on which they have opened and closed the
locker and obtain their signature.
requirements.object: all individuals, including the locker-hirers, who have accessed the lockers and the date and time (both check-in and check-out ti

requirements.full_sentence:
The ingress and egress register for access to Vault
Room by locker-hirers or any other individual including the RRB's staff shall be
maintained to record the movement of individuals in the Vault Room area with their
signatures at appropriate place in the records.
requirements.object: the movement of individuals in the Vault Room area with their signatures at appropriate place in the records

requirements.full_sentence:
The RRB's officer authorising the locker-hirer to access the locker, after unlocking
the first key / password, shall not remain present when the locker is opened by the locker-
hirer.
requirements.object: locker is opened by the locker- hirer

requirements.full_sentence:
The RRB shall ensure that there is adequate privacy to the locker-hirers in the
operations when customers access the lockers at the same time.
requirements.object: adequate privacy to the locker-hirers in the operations when customers access the lockers at the same time

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall send an email and SMS alert to the registered email address and
mobile number of the customer before the end of the day as a positive confirmation
intimating the date and time of the locker operation and the redressal mechanism
<image>
available in case of unauthorised locker access.
requirements.object: SMS alert to the registered email address and mobile number of the customer before the end of the day as a positive confirmation int

requirements.full_sentence:
There shall be a system of inter-change of locks whenever the locker is surrendered
by the hirer.
requirements.object: inter-change of locks whenever the locker is surrendered by the hirer

requirements.full_sentence: The keys of vacant lockers shall be kept in sealed envelopes.
requirements.object: envelopes

requirements.full_sentence:
The duplicate
master keys shall be deposited with another branch of the RRB.
requirements.object: branch of the RRB

requirements.full_sentence:
There shall be proper
record of joint custody of master keys.
requirements.object: joint custody of master keys

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall conduct surprise periodic verification
of surrendered / vacant lockers and their keys by an officer of the bank who is not
connected with their custody and proper record shall be maintained as a proof of such
verification.
requirements.object: of surrendered / vacant lockers and their keys by an officer of the bank who is not connected with their custod

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall ensure that the Locker Register and the Locker Key Register are
maintained in CBS or any other computerised system compliant with the Cyber Security
Framework issued by the Reserve Bank.
requirements.object: Register and the Locker Key Register are maintained in CBS or any other computerised system compliant with the Cyber Security F

requirements.full_sentence:
The Locker Register shall be updated in case
of any change in the allotment with complete audit trails.
requirements.object: of any change in the allotment with complete audit trails

requirements.full_sentence:
The bank custodian shall check whether the lockers are properly closed post locker
operation.
requirements.object: are properly closed post locker operation

conditions: If the same is not done
if registered or through SMS
requirements.full_sentence:
If the same is not done, the lockers must be immediately closed, and the locker-
hirer shall be promptly intimated through e-mail, if registered or through SMS, if mobile
number is registered or through letter so that they may verify any resulting discrepancy in
the contents of the locker.
requirements.object: e-mail

requirements.full_sentence:
The bank custodian shall record the fact of not closing the
locker properly in the register and its closure by the RRB with the date and time.
requirements.object: not closing the locker properly in the register and its closure by the RRB with the date and time

requirements.full_sentence:
Further,
the custodian of the locker room shall carry out a physical check of the locker room at the
end of the day to ensure that lockers are properly closed, and that no person is
inadvertently trapped in the locker room after banking hours.
requirements.object: check of the locker room at the end of the day to ensure that lockers are properly closed, and that no person is inadvertently tr

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall have a clear Board approved policy together with a SOP for breaking
open the lockers for all possible situations keeping in view the relevant legal and
contractual provisions.
requirements.object: approved policy together with a SOP for breaking open the lockers for all possible situations keeping in view the relevant legal an

conditions: If the key of the locker
requirements.full_sentence:
If the key of the locker, supplied by the RRB is lost by the locker-hirer, the customer
(locker hirer) shall notify the RRB immediately.

conditions: if found in future
requirements.full_sentence:
An undertaking may also be obtained from
the customer that the key lost, if found in future, will be handed over to the RRB.
requirements.object: the customer that the key lost

requirements.full_sentence:
All
charges for opening the locker, changing the lock and replacing the lost key may be
recovered from the hirer.
requirements.object: hirer

requirements.full_sentence:
The charges applicable for replacement of lost keys / issue of
new password shall be communicated to the locker hirer.
requirements.object: locker hirer

requirements.full_sentence:
The operation shall be done in the presence of the customer/s and an authorised
official of the RRB.
requirements.object: presence of the customer/s and an authorised official of the RRB

requirements.full_sentence:
In case of attachment and recovery of the contents in a locker of a customer or the
articles left by a customer for safe custody of an RRB by any Authority acting either under
<image>
