the orders of a Court or any other competent authority vested with the power to pass such
orders, the RRB shall co-operate in execution and implementation of the orders.
requirements.object: implementation of the orders

requirements.full_sentence:
The RRB shall verify and satisfy itself about the orders and the connected
documents received for attachment and recovery of the contents in a locker or articles in
the safe custody of the RRB.
requirements.object: about the orders and the connected documents received for attachment and recovery of the contents in a locker or articles in

requirements.full_sentence:
The customer (locker-hirer) shall be informed by letter as
well as by email / SMS to the registered email address / mobile phone number that the
Government Authorities have approached for attachment and recovery or seizure of the
locker or articles deposited for safe custody.
requirements.object: as well as by email / SMS to the registered email address / mobile phone number that the Government Authorities have approached

requirements.full_sentence:
An inventory of the contents of locker and
articles seized and recovered by the Authority shall be prepared in the presence of such
Government Authorities, two independent witnesses and an officer of the RRB and shall
be signed by all.
requirements.object: presence of such Government Authorities, two independent witnesses and an officer of the RRB and shall be signed by all

requirements.full_sentence:
A copy of the inventory may be forwarded to the customer to the address
available in the RRB's records or handed over to the customer against acknowledgement.
requirements.object: customer to the address available in the RRB's records or handed over to the customer against acknowledgement

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall also record a video of the break-open process and the inventory
assessment, wherever legally permissible, and preserve the video to produce as
evidence in case of any dispute or Court or fraud case in future.
requirements.object: of the break-open process and the inventory assessment

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall have the discretion to break open any locker following due procedure
if the rent has not been paid by the customer for three years in a row.
requirements.object: break open any locker following due procedure if the rent has not been paid by the customer for three years in a row

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall ensure
to notify the existing locker-hirer prior to any changes in the allotment and give him / her
reasonable opportunity to withdraw the articles deposited by him / her.
requirements.object: existing locker-hirer prior to any changes in the allotment and give him / her reasonable opportunity to withdraw the articles de

requirements.full_sentence:
A clause may be
incorporated in the locker agreement to this effect.
requirements.object: locker agreement to this effect

requirements.full_sentence:
Before breaking open the locker, an RRB shall give due notice to the locker-hirer
through a letter and through email and SMS alert to the registered email address and
mobile phone number.
requirements.object: the locker-hirer through a letter and through email and SMS alert to the registered email address and mobile phone number

conditions:
If the letter is returned undelivered or the locker-hirer is not
traceable
requirements.full_sentence:
If the letter is returned undelivered or the locker-hirer is not
traceable, an RRB shall issue public notice in two newspaper dailies (one in English and
another in local language) giving reasonable time to the locker-hirer or to any other
person/s who has interest in the contents of locker to respond.
requirements.object: two newspaper dailies (one in English and another in local language) giving reasonable time to the locker-hirer or to any other

requirements.full_sentence:
The locker shall be broken
open in the presence of an officer of the RRB and two independent witnesses.
requirements.object: the presence of an officer of the RRB and two independent witnesses

conditions:
In case of
electronically operated lockers (including Smart Vaults)
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of
electronically operated lockers (including Smart Vaults), the use of 'Vault Administrator'
password for opening of locker shall be assigned to a senior official and complete audit
<image>
trail of access shall be preserved.
requirements.object: senior official and complete audit <image> trail of access shall be preserved

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, an RRB shall also record a video of the break
open process together with inventory assessment and its safe keep and preserve the
same so as to provide evidence in case of any dispute or Court case in future.
requirements.object: of the break open process together with inventory assessment and its safe keep and preserve the same so as to provide evidence in

requirements.full_sentence:
The RRB
shall also ensure that the details of breaking open of locker is documented in CBS or any
other computerised systems compliant with the Cyber Security Framework issued by RBI,
apart from locker register.
requirements.object: details of breaking open of locker is documented in CBS or any other computerised systems compliant with the Cyber Security Frame

requirements.full_sentence:
After breaking open of locker, the contents shall be kept in
sealed envelope with detailed inventory inside fireproof safe in a tamper-proof way until
customer claims it.
requirements.object: envelope with detailed inventory inside fireproof safe in a tamper-proof way until customer claims it

requirements.full_sentence: A record of access to the fireproof safe shall invariably be maintained.

While returning the contents of the locker, the RRB shall obtain acknowledgement of the
customer on the inventory list to avoid any dispute in future.
requirements.object: customer on the inventory list to avoid any dispute in future

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall ensure that the inventory prepared after breaking open of the locker
is as per Annex III (effective till March 31, 2026) or Annex X (effective on or after April 1,
2026 or if implemented earlier by the RRB) or as near thereto as circumstances require.
requirements.object: prepared after breaking open of the locker is as per Annex III (effective till March 31, 2026) or Annex X (effective on or a

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the RRB shall not open sealed / closed packets left with them for safe custody
or found in locker while releasing them to the nominee(s) and surviving locker hirers /
depositor of safe custody article, unless required by law.
requirements.object: packets left with them for safe custody or found in locker while releasing them to the nominee(s) and surviving locker hirers / depositor of safe custody article

conditions:
If the locker remains inoperative for a period of seven years and the locker-hirer
cannot be located
if rent is being paid regularly
requirements.full_sentence:
If the locker remains inoperative for a period of seven years and the locker-hirer
cannot be located, even if rent is being paid regularly, an RRB shall be at liberty to transfer
the contents of the locker to their nominees / legal heir or dispose of the articles in a
transparent manner, as the case may be.
requirements.object: transfer the contents of the locker to their nominees / legal heir or dispose of the articles in a transparent manner, as the case ma

requirements.full_sentence:
Before breaking open the locker, an RRB shall
follow the procedure as prescribed in paragraphs 293 and 294 above.
requirements.object: prescribed in paragraphs 293 and 294 above

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall
ensure that the procedure to be followed by them for disposal of the articles left unclaimed
for a reasonably long period of time as mentioned above is incorporated in their locker
agreement.
requirements.object: to be followed by them for disposal of the articles left unclaimed for a reasonably long period of time as mentioned above i

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall ensure that appropriate terms are inserted in the locker agreement
executed with the customer specifying the position in case the locker is not in operation
for long period.
requirements.object: are inserted in the locker agreement executed with the customer specifying the position in case the locker is not in ope

requirements.full_sentence:
A clause may also be incorporated in the locker agreement to discharge
an RRB from liability in case the locker is not in operation and the locker is opened by the
<image>
RRB and contents are released as per law and as per the instructions issued by the
Reserve Bank and the terms and conditions prescribed in the agreement.
requirements.object: the locker agreement to discharge an RRB from liability in case the locker is not in operation and the locker is opened by the

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall put in place a detailed Board approved policy outlining the
responsibility owed by it for any loss or damage to the contents of the lockers due to its
negligence as bank owe a separate duty of care to exercise due diligence in maintaining
and operating its locker or safety deposit systems.
requirements.object: detailed Board approved policy outlining the responsibility owed by it for any loss or damage to the contents of the lockers due to its

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the bank
shall adhere to the Master Directions on Frauds for reporting requirements about the
instances of robberies, dacoities, thefts and burglaries.
requirements.object: Directions on Frauds for reporting requirements about the instances of robberies, dacoities, thefts and burglaries

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall not be liable for any damage and / or loss of contents of locker arising
from natural calamities or Acts of God like earthquake, floods, lightning and thunderstorm
or any act that is attributable to the sole fault or negligence of the customer.
requirements.object: damage and / or loss of contents of locker arising from natural calamities or Acts of God like earthquake, floods, lightning and thu

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall,
however, exercise appropriate care to its locker systems to protect its premises from such
catastrophes.
requirements.object: care to its locker systems to protect its premises from such catastrophes

conditions:
where loss of contents of locker are due to
incidents mentioned above or attributable to fraud committed by its employee(s)
requirements.full_sentence:
As an RRB cannot claim that it bears no liability towards its customers for
loss of contents of the locker, in instances where loss of contents of locker are due to
incidents mentioned above or attributable to fraud committed by its employee(s), the
<image>
RRB's liability shall be for an amount equivalent to one hundred times the prevailing
annual rent of the safe deposit locker.
requirements.object: equivalent to one hundred times the prevailing annual rent of the safe deposit locker

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB, with the approval of its Board, shall have a branch insurance policy to
minimise the loss due to incidents like robbery, fire, natural calamities, loss during shifting
/ merger of branch, etc., affecting contents of lockers.
requirements.object: policy to minimise the loss due to incidents like robbery, fire, natural calamities, loss during shifting / merger of branch,

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall clarify in its locker agreement that as it does not keep a record of the
contents of the locker or of any articles removed therefrom or placed therein by the
customer, they would not be under any liability to insure the contents of the locker against
any risk whatsoever.
requirements.object: agreement that as it does not keep a record of the contents of the locker or of any articles removed therefrom or placed therein

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall under no circumstances offer, directly or indirectly,
any insurance product to its locker hirers for insurance of locker contents.
requirements.object: directly or indirectly, any insurance product to its locker hirers for insurance of locker contents

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall display the model locker agreement with all the Terms & Conditions
and the SOPs on various aspects on its website and / or at branches (if official website is
not available) where locker facility is being provided by it for public viewing.
requirements.object: agreement with all the Terms & Conditions and the SOPs on various aspects on its website and / or at branches (if official we

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall
ensure that the customers are made aware of the bank's terms and conditions to avail
those facilities.
requirements.object: are made aware of the bank's terms and conditions to avail those facilities

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall display updated information on all kinds of charges for safe deposit
lockers and safe custody articles on its website.
requirements.object: all kinds of charges for safe deposit lockers and safe custody articles on its website

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall place on its website, the instructions together with the policies /
procedures put in place for giving access of the locker / safe custody article to the
nominee(s) / survivor(s) / legal heir(s) of the deceased locker hirer / safe custody article.
requirements.object: the instructions together with the policies / procedures put in place for giving access of the locker / safe custody article to

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, a printed copy of the same shall also be given to the nominee(s) / survivor(s) /
legal heir(s).
requirements.object: the nominee(s) / survivor(s) / legal heir(s)

requirements.full_sentence:
Accordingly, these directions are issued to banks to
implement the nomination facility and shall be read with sections 45ZA to 45ZG of The
Banking Regulation Act, 1949 and the Nomination Rules framed thereunder.
requirements.object: 45ZA to 45ZG of The Banking Regulation Act, 1949 and the Nomination Rules framed thereunder

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall offer nomination facility in deposit accounts in accordance with the
provisions of sections 45ZA, 45ZB and 45ZG of the Act and the Rules.
requirements.object: deposit accounts in accordance with the provisions of sections 45ZA, 45ZB and 45ZG of the Act and the Rules

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall be guided by the provisions of sections 45ZC to 45ZG of the Act and
the Rules in the matter of nomination in safe deposit lockers and articles kept in safe
custody.
requirements.object: provisions of sections 45ZC to 45ZG of the Act and the Rules in the matter of nomination in safe deposit lockers and articles kept in

conditions:
if an individual is
keeping an account for his/ her proprietorship business
requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: For the purpose of these Directions, it is clarified that if an individual is
keeping an account for his/ her proprietorship business, it will be deemed as that
individual's account and the nomination facility shall be offered in such accounts.
requirements.object: accounts

requirements.full_sentence:
At the time of account opening, an RRB shall explicitly inform the prospective
customer of the availability and purpose of the nomination facility and offer him/ her the
option to avail the same.
requirements.object: customer of the availability and purpose of the nomination facility and offer him/ her the option to avail the same

requirements.full_sentence:
The RRB shall also clearly explain to the prospective customer
the advantages of the nomination facility, including but not limited to simplification of the
claim process in the event of the account holder's demise and facilitation of smooth and
prompt transfer of funds to the nominee without legal complications.
requirements.object: the prospective customer the advantages of the nomination facility, including but not limited to simplification of the claim p

conditions:
If the prospective customer chooses not to avail the nomination facility despite being
fully informed
if otherwise found eligible
requirements.full_sentence:
If the prospective customer chooses not to avail the nomination facility despite being
fully informed, the RRB shall proceed to open the deposit account without imposing any
restrictions, if otherwise found eligible, after obtaining a written declaration from the
individual confirming that he/ she does not require the nomination facility at the time of
<image>
account opening.
requirements.object: deposit account without imposing any restrictions

conditions: If he/she refuses to provide the written declaration
requirements.full_sentence:
If he/she refuses to provide the written declaration, the RRB shall record
the fact of refusal to submit written confirmation in the account opening records.
requirements.object: refusal to submit written confirmation in the account opening records

requirements.full_sentence:
Under no circumstances shall a prospective customer be denied or delayed in
opening an account solely on the ground of refusal to make a nomination, provided all
other requirements for account opening are satisfactorily met.
requirements.object: denied or delayed in opening an account solely on the ground of refusal to make a nomination

conditions: In case of simultaneous nomination

if any nominee dies prior to receiving the
deposit from an RRB
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of simultaneous nomination, if any nominee dies prior to receiving the
deposit from an RRB, the nomination in respect of such nominee alone shall become
ineffective.

Accordingly, the RRB shall settle the claims of the amount of deposit made in
favour of such nominee in accordance with provisions applicable for accounts without
nominee clause as contained in paragraphs 328 to 335 of these Directions.
requirements.object: the amount of deposit made in favour of such nominee in accordance with provisions applicable for accounts without nominee clause

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall have in place appropriate systems and procedures to register in its
books the registration, cancellation and variation of the nomination, as per the request of
the customers.
requirements.object: systems and procedures to register in its books the registration, cancellation and variation of the nomination, as per the r

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall devise proper systems for acknowledging the receipt of the duly
completed forms of registration, cancellation and/ or variation of the nomination.
requirements.object: acknowledging the receipt of the duly completed forms of registration, cancellation and/ or variation of the nomination

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall verify and ensure that the nomination(s) made by its customers are in
accordance with relevant provisions of the Act and the Rules before providing
acknowledgement to them.
requirements.object: the nomination(s) made by its customers are in accordance with relevant provisions of the Act and the Rules before providing ac

requirements.full_sentence:
Such acknowledgement shall be given to the customers within three working days
of receiving the forms of registration, cancellation and / or variation of nomination,
irrespective of whether the same is asked for by the customers.
requirements.object: customers within three working days of receiving the forms of registration, cancellation and / or variation of nomination, irrespectiv

requirements.full_sentence:
Where a nomination request is found not to be in conformity with the provisions of
the Act or the Rules and is consequently rejected, an RRB shall inform the customer in
writing, clearly indicating the reasons for such rejection, within three working days of the
receipt of the request form.
requirements.object: writing, clearly indicating the reasons for such rejection, within three working days of the receipt of the request form

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall record the status regarding registration of nomination on the face of
the passbook/ Statement of Account and TDR, with the legend "Nomination Registered".
requirements.object: registration of nomination on the face of the passbook/ Statement of Account and TDR, with the legend "Nomination Register

requirements.full_sentence:
The RRB shall also indicate the name of the Nominee(s) in the Passbook/ Statement
of Accounts and TDR in such cases.
requirements.object: of the Nominee(s) in the Passbook/ Statement of Accounts and TDR in such cases

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall give wide publicity and provide guidance to deposit account holders,
locker hirers and depositors of articles in safe custody on the benefits of the nomination
facility.
requirements.object: provide guidance to deposit account holders, locker hirers and depositors of articles in safe custody on the benefits of the n

requirements.full_sentence:
This may include printing compatible messages on cheque book, passbook and
other literature reaching the customers as well as launching periodical awareness drives.
requirements.object: on cheque book, passbook and other literature reaching the customers as well as launching periodical awareness dr

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall ensure that the form for opening deposit accounts, hiring safe deposit
lockers and depositing articles in safe custody contains space for getting the details of
nomination, which also serves the purpose of educating the customers about availability
of such facility.
requirements.object: for opening deposit accounts, hiring safe deposit lockers and depositing articles in safe custody contains space for getting the

conditions:
in case of Government
savings schemes administered by banks such as Senior Citizen Savings Scheme
(SCSS)
requirements.full_sentence:
These directions given in this section shall not be applicable in case of Government
savings schemes administered by banks such as Senior Citizen Savings Scheme
(SCSS), Public Provident Fund (PPF), etc.
requirements.object: of Government savings schemes administered by banks such as Senior Citizen Savings Scheme (SCSS), Public Provident Fund (PPF), e

requirements.full_sentence:
Settlement of claims in such cases shall be as
per the provisions of the respective schemes.
requirements.object: provisions of the respective schemes

requirements.full_sentence:
For the limited purpose of directions in this section, unless the context otherwise
requires, the following definitions shall apply:
(1) 'Customer' refers to a person who may be a depositor or a locker hirer or has
placed articles in safe custody with a bank.
requirements.object: to a person who may be a depositor or a locker hirer or has placed articles in safe custody with a bank

requirements.full_sentence: (3) 'Threshold limit' means ₹15 lakh or such higher limit as may be fixed by the RRB.
requirements.object: RRB

conditions:
where a depositor had made nomination in terms of the provisions
of the Banking Regulation Act

where the account was opened with survivorship
clause
requirements.full_sentence:
A deposit account where a depositor had made nomination in terms of the provisions
of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or where the account was opened with survivorship
clause, the payment of the outstanding balance upon the death of the depositor(s) to the
nominee(s) / survivor(s) shall be considered a valid discharge of an RRB's
liability, provided:
(1) the RRB has exercised due care and caution in establishing the identity of the
nominee(s) / survivor(s) and the deceased status of the account holder(s) by
obtaining appropriate documentary evidence (physical or equivalent e-document);
requirements.object: discharge of an RRB's liability

requirements.full_sentence:
and
(3) it has been made clear in writing to the nominee(s) / survivor(s) that they would be
receiving the payment from the RRB as a trustee of the legal heirs of the deceased
depositor(s), i.e., such payment to them shall not affect the right or claim which any
person may have against the nominee(s) / survivor(s) to the extent of the payment
made to them.
requirements.object: claim which any person may have against the nominee(s) / survivor(s) to the extent of the payment made to them

requirements.full_sentence:
Payment made to the nominee(s) / survivor(s), subject to the foregoing conditions,
shall constitute a full and valid discharge of a bank's liability.
requirements.object: valid discharge of a bank's liability

requirements.full_sentence:
Therefore, in such cases,
while making payment to the nominee(s) / survivor(s) of the deceased depositor(s), an
RRB shall not insist on production of legal documents such as Succession Certificate,
<image>
Letter of Administration, Probate of Will, etc., or seek any bond of indemnity / surety from
the nominee(s) / survivor(s) / third-party, irrespective of the amount standing to the credit
of the deceased account holder(s).
requirements.object: legal documents such as Succession Certificate, <image> Letter of Administration, Probate of Will, etc
following documents in such cases: (1) Claim form, as given in Annex V, duly signed by the nominee(s) / survivor(s)

conditions: where the aggregate amount payable
in case of a joint account
requirements.full_sentence:
Keeping in view the imperative need to avoid inconvenience and undue hardship to
the legal heir(s) / claimant(s), an RRB shall follow a simplified procedure for settlement of
claims in respect of deposit accounts where the aggregate amount payable, including
accrued interest, as on the date of the application is less than the threshold limit,
provided
(1) a deceased depositor(s) had not made any nomination or in case of a joint account,
the account was without nominee / survivorship clause,
(2) there is no Will left behind by the deceased depositor(s),
(3) there is no contesting claim, and
(4) there is no order from a competent court in the knowledge of the RRB, restraining
the claimant(s) from receiving nor the RRB from making the payment.
requirements.object: for settlement of claims in respect of deposit accounts where the aggregate amount payable, including accrued interest, as on the date of the application is less than the threshold limit
to the threshold limit based on: (1) Claim form, as given in Annex VI, duly filled in and signed by the claimant(s) other than tho

requirements.full_sentence:
No bond of surety from a third-party shall be obtained in case of claims up to the
threshold limit.
requirements.object: of claims up to the threshold limit

conditions: where claim amount is above the threshold limit
requirements.full_sentence:
In cases where claim amount is above the threshold limit, an RRB shall settle the
claim based on:
(1) Succession Certificate and documents mentioned at paragraph 329 (1) to (3)
above;
requirements.object: on: (1) Succession Certificate and documents mentioned at paragraph 329 (1) to (3) above

requirements.full_sentence:
In such cases, the RRB shall call for the documents at paragraph 329 (1) to (5)
above.
requirements.object: at paragraph 329 (1) to (5) above

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB may also call for a bond of surety, as given in Annex VII, from
third-party individuals (which may include non-claimant legal heir(s)) who are
acceptable to the RRB and good for the claim amount.
requirements.object: bond of surety, as given in Annex VII, from third-party individuals (which may include non-claimant legal heir(s)) who are acceptable

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall settle claims involving 'Will' left behind by a deceased depositor on
the basis of Probate of Will / Letter of Administration, as applicable, in addition to
documents mentioned at paragraph 329 (1) to (3) above.
requirements.object: left behind by a deceased depositor on the basis of Probate of Will / Letter of Administration, as applicable, in addit

conditions:
where a person other
than a legal heir is named as a beneficiary in the Will
requirements.full_sentence:
In cases where a person other
than a legal heir is named as a beneficiary in the Will, applicable documents shall also be
obtained from her / him.
requirements.object: her / him

requirements.full_sentence:
In such cases, an RRB shall additionally call for the
documents mentioned at paragraph 329 (4) and (5) above.
requirements.object: documents mentioned at paragraph 329 (4) and (5) above

requirements.full_sentence:
In case of contesting claims or dispute amongst the legal heir(s) and / or the
beneficiaries named in the Will of the deceased depositor, an RRB shall settle claims on
the basis of Probate of Will or Letter of Administration or Succession Certificate or Court
order / decree, as applicable, and the documents mentioned at paragraph 329 (1) to (3)
above.
requirements.object: basis of Probate of Will or Letter of Administration or Succession Certificate or Court order / decree, as applicable, and the do

conditions:
where there is an order from a Court restraining an RRB from making the
payment
requirements.full_sentence:
Further, where there is an order from a Court restraining an RRB from making the
payment, the claim shall not be entertained during the period the order is in force.
requirements.object: period the order is in force

requirements.full_sentence:
The
settlement of claim shall be considered based on subsequent Court order to that effect.
requirements.object: subsequent Court order to that effect

requirements.full_sentence:
No bond of surety shall be insisted from a third party in cases falling under either
E.1.2.2.1 or E.1.2.2.2 above.
requirements.object: third party in cases falling under either E

conditions:
in case any credit is received in the name
of a deceased depositor
requirements.full_sentence:
Post settlement of the deposit account(s), in case any credit is received in the name
of a deceased depositor, an RRB shall return the same to the remitter with the remark
'Account holder deceased' and intimate the nominee(s) / survivor(s) / legal heir(s).
requirements.object: the remitter with the remark 'Account holder deceased' and intimate the nominee(s) / survivor(s) / legal heir(s)

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall incorporate a clause in the account opening form itself to the effect
that in the event of death of the depositor, premature termination of term deposits would
be allowed without any penal charge, even if the deposit is within the lock-in-period.
requirements.object: the account opening form itself to the effect that in the event of death of the depositor, premature termination of term depos

requirements.full_sentence:
Premature termination of term deposits opened jointly, with or without survivorship
clause, shall require the consent of the surviving depositors and the legal heir(s) of the
deceased joint holder, in case of death of one of the depositors.
requirements.object: the surviving depositors and the legal heir(s) of the deceased joint holder, in case of death of one of the depositors

conditions:
in case of joint
accounts with survivorship clause

if a specific mandate is furnished by all the depositors
jointly to the RRB
requirements.full_sentence:
However, in case of joint
accounts with survivorship clause, if a specific mandate is furnished by all the depositors
jointly to the RRB, either at the time of placing the term deposit or anytime subsequently
during the tenure of the deposit, then premature withdrawal option shall be allowed to the
survivors on the death of any of the depositors, without seeking the concurrence of the
legal heir(s) of the deceased joint deposit holder.
requirements.object: survivors on the death of any of the depositors, without seeking the concurrence of the legal heir(s) of the deceased joint deposit

requirements.full_sentence:
The nominee(s) / legal heir(s) of a missing person shall be required to get an order
from the competent court under the provisions of Sections 110 or 111 of the Bharatiya
Sakshya Adhiniyam, 2023.
requirements.object: an order from the competent court under the provisions of Sections 110 or 111 of the Bharatiya Sakshya Adhiniyam, 2023

requirements.full_sentence:
The claim in respect of such missing person shall be settled
as per the procedure applicable for settlement of claims in respect of a deceased
customer.
requirements.object: the procedure applicable for settlement of claims in respect of a deceased customer

requirements.full_sentence:
In such cases, a copy of the court order declaring the civil death of the account
holder shall be obtained in lieu of the death certificate.
requirements.object: of the death certificate

conditions: where the aggregate amount payable
requirements.full_sentence:
However, to avoid inconvenience
and undue hardship to the common person where the aggregate amount payable,
including accrued interest, as on the date of the application is less than ₹1 lakh or such
higher amount as may be fixed by an RRB, a copy of the First Information Report (FIR)
and non-traceable report issued by police authorities shall be obtained in lieu of death
certificate or an order from a competent court declaring the civil death of the account
holder for settling the claim.
requirements.object: of death certificate or an order from a competent court declaring the civil death of the account holder for settling the claim

conditions:
If a sole locker hirer nominates an individual(s) to receive the contents in the locker
<image>
in case of her / his death
requirements.full_sentence:
If a sole locker hirer nominates an individual(s) to receive the contents in the locker
<image>
in case of her / his death, an RRB shall give access of the locker to such nominee(s) with
liberty to remove the contents of the locker.
requirements.object: locker to such nominee(s) with liberty to remove the contents of the locker

conditions:
In case the locker was hired jointly with the instructions to operate it under joint
signatures
requirements.full_sentence:
In case the locker was hired jointly with the instructions to operate it under joint
signatures, and the locker hirers nominate any other individual(s), in the event of death
of any of the locker hirers, an RRB shall give access of the locker and the liberty to remove
the contents jointly to the nominee(s) and the survivor(s).
requirements.object: locker and the liberty to remove the contents jointly to the nominee(s) and the survivor(s)

requirements.full_sentence:
In case the locker was hired jointly with survivorship clause and the hirers instructed
that the access of the locker should be given to "either or survivor", "anyone or survivor"
or "former or survivor" or according to any other survivorship clause permissible under
the provisions of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, an RRB shall follow the mandate in
the event of death of one or more of the joint locker hirers.
requirements.object: the event of death of one or more of the joint locker hirers

conditions: In case of a minor nominee
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of a minor nominee, an RRB shall ensure that, the contents of locker, when
sought to be removed on behalf of the minor nominee, are handed over to the guardian
whose details have been provided in the nomination form.
requirements.object: of locker

conditions:
If the details of the guardian
have not been provided in the nomination form
requirements.full_sentence:
If the details of the guardian
have not been provided in the nomination form, an RRB shall hand over the contents of
the locker to a person who is, in law, competent to receive the contents of safe deposit
locker on behalf of such minor.
requirements.object: of the locker to a person who is, in law, competent to receive the contents of safe deposit locker on behalf of such minor
RRB for processing the claim in cases falling under paragraphs 340 and 341 above: (1) Claim form, as given in Annex V, duly signed b

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall, however, ensure the following before giving access to the contents
to the nominee(s) / survivor(s):
(1) Exercise due care and caution in establishing the identity of the nominee(s)/
survivor(s) and deceased status of the locker hirer(s) by obtaining appropriate
documentary evidence (physical or equivalent e-document);
requirements.object: following before giving access to the contents to the nominee(s) / survivor(s): (1) Exercise due care and caution in establishin

requirements.full_sentence:
and
(3) Make it clear to the nominee(s) / survivor(s) that access and liberty to remove the
contents of the locker is given to them only as a trustee of the legal heir(s) of the
deceased locker hirer(s), i.e., such access and liberty to remove the contents given
to them shall not affect the right or claim which any person may have against the
nominee(s) / survivor(s) to whom the access is given.
requirements.object: claim which any person may have against the nominee(s) / survivor(s) to whom the access is given

requirements.full_sentence:
After receipt of the documents mentioned at paragraph 344 above and being
satisfied to the genuineness of the claim, the RRB shall correspond with the nominee(s)
/ survivor(s) in writing and fix a date and time for making an inventory of the contents of
the safe deposit locker.
requirements.object: / survivor(s) in writing and fix a date and time for making an inventory of the contents of the safe deposit locker

requirements.full_sentence:
The same shall be undertaken in the presence of the nominee(s)
and / or survivor(s) and / or their authorised representatives, two independent witnesses
(should not be employee or ex-employee of the RRB), the safe deposit vault custodian
and another employee of the RRB not associated with locker operations, and recorded
as per the inventory form given in Annex X.
requirements.object: presence of the nominee(s) and / or survivor(s) and / or their authorised representatives, two independent witnesses (should not

requirements.full_sentence:
The RRB shall then hand over the possession
of the contents of the locker to the nominee(s) / survivor(s) / the person competent to
receive the contents on behalf of the minor, as the case may be, and obtain an
acknowledgment, as given in Annex X, that all the contents in the locker of the deceased
hirer(s) have been removed and the locker is empty, and they have no objection to
allotment of the locker to any other locker hirer as per norms of the RRB.
requirements.object: possession of the contents of the locker to the nominee(s) / survivor(s) / the person competent to receive the contents on behalf o

requirements.full_sentence:
Production of legal documents, viz., Succession Certificate, Letter of Administration,
Probate of Will, etc., or Bond of indemnity from the nominee(s) / survivor(s) shall not be
required unless there is any discrepancy in nomination.
requirements.object: is any discrepancy in nomination

requirements.full_sentence:
Procedure, as prescribed in paragraphs 340 to 347 above, shall be followed mutatis
mutandis for return of articles kept by the deceased customer in the safe custody of the
bank.
requirements.object: for return of articles kept by the deceased customer in the safe custody of the bank

requirements.full_sentence: However, inventory form given in Annex XI shall be used in such cases.
requirements.object: cases

requirements.full_sentence:
Keeping in view the imperative need to avoid inconvenience and undue hardship to
the legal heir(s) / claimant(s), an RRB shall adopt a simplified procedure for settlement of
claims in safe deposit lockers provided there is no dispute amongst the legal heir(s) /
claimant(s) and
(1) the deceased locker hirer(s) had not made any nomination, or
(2) the joint hirers had not given any mandate that the access may be given to one or
more of the survivors by a clear survivorship clause, or
(3) there is no 'Will' left behind by the deceased locker hirer.
requirements.object: for settlement of claims in safe deposit lockers provided there is no dispute amongst the legal heir(s) / claimant(s) and

requirements.full_sentence:
In cases falling under the simplified procedure, an RRB shall obtain the following
documents to settle the claim without obtaining any legal documents such as Succession
Certificate, Letter of Administration, Court order, etc.
requirements.object: to settle the claim without obtaining any legal documents such as Succession Certificate, Letter of Administration, Cou

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall settle claims involving 'Will' left behind by a deceased safe deposit
locker hirer on the basis of Probate of Will / Letter of Administration, as applicable, in
addition to documents mentioned at paragraphs 350 (1) to (3) above.
requirements.object: left behind by a deceased safe deposit locker hirer on the basis of Probate of Will / Letter of Administration, as appl

conditions:
where a
person other than a legal heir is named as a beneficiary in the Will
requirements.full_sentence:
In cases where a
person other than a legal heir is named as a beneficiary in the Will, applicable documents
shall also be obtained from her / him.
requirements.object: her / him

requirements.full_sentence:
However, an RRB may exercise discretion and act as per 'Will' of the deceased
without requiring production of the probate of such Will, provided the same is not
inconsistent with applicable laws, there is no dispute regarding the Will amongst the legal
heir(s) and/ or beneficiaries named in the Will and the RRB is otherwise satisfied as to
the genuineness of the Will.
requirements.object: as per 'Will' of the deceased without requiring production of the probate of such Will

requirements.full_sentence:
In such cases, an RRB shall additionally call for the
documents mentioned at paragraphs 350 (4) and (5) above.
requirements.object: documents mentioned at paragraphs 350 (4) and (5) above

requirements.full_sentence:
Cases involving dispute amongst the legal heir(s) and / or beneficiaries named in
the Will, as applicable, shall be settled based on Probate of Will or Succession Certificate
or Letter of Administration or Court order / decree, as the case may be, and the
documents mentioned at paragraphs 350 (1) to (3) above.
requirements.object: Probate of Will or Succession Certificate or Letter of Administration or Court order / decree, as the case may be, and the documen

requirements.full_sentence:
After receipt of the required documents in claims falling under categories at E.2.2.1
and E.2.2.2 above and being satisfied to the genuineness of the claim, the RRB shall
correspond with the claimant(s) in writing and fix a date and time for making an inventory
of the contents of the safe deposit locker, as given in form prescribed in Annex X, in the
presence of all claimant(s) or their duly authorised representatives, two independent
witnesses (should not be employee or ex-employee of the RRB), the safe deposit vault
custodian and another employee of the RRB not associated with locker operations.
requirements.object: in writing and fix a date and time for making an inventory of the contents of the safe deposit locker, as given in for

requirements.full_sentence:
Valuation of the contents of the safe deposit locker shall be carried out by an independent
valuer and recorded in the Bond of Indemnity as given in Annex XII.
requirements.object: an independent valuer and recorded in the Bond of Indemnity as given in Annex XII

requirements.full_sentence:
The claimant(s) or
their duly authorised representative(s) may remove the contents of the locker subsequent
<image>
to submission of the Bond of Indemnity.
requirements.object: the locker subsequent <image> to submission of the Bond of Indemnity

requirements.full_sentence:
Bond of Indemnity shall not be required to be
given in cases of claims settled on the basis of legal documents such as Probate of Will
or Succession Certificate or Letter of Administration or Court order / decree, etc.
requirements.object: given in cases of claims settled on the basis of legal documents such as Probate of Will or Succession Certificate or Letter of Admi

requirements.full_sentence:
Procedure, as prescribed in paragraphs 349 to 354 above, shall be followed mutatis
mutandis for return of articles kept by the deceased customer in the safe custody of the
RRB.
requirements.object: for return of articles kept by the deceased customer in the safe custody of the RRB

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall use the standardised forms for receiving the claims and other
documents as per the formats provided in Annex V to Annex XII.
requirements.object: for receiving the claims and other documents as per the formats provided in Annex V to Annex XII

requirements.full_sentence:
The standardised forms and other documents required for settlement of claims with
respect to the deposit accounts / safe deposit locker / articles in safe custody kept by a
deceased customer shall be made available in all the branches as well as on the RRB's
website for the convenience of the claimant(s).
requirements.object: all the branches as well as on the RRB's website for the convenience of the claimant(s)

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the RRB shall also display on its
website, the list of documents to be submitted by a claimant and the procedure to be
followed for settlement of claims in various scenarios.
requirements.object: website, the list of documents to be submitted by a claimant and the procedure to be followed for settlement of claims in various

requirements.full_sentence:
A claimant shall be allowed to lodge the claim at any of the branches against
acknowledgment.
requirements.object: the claim at any of the branches against acknowledgment

conditions:
In case all required documents for processing of the claim have been
submitted by the claimant
requirements.full_sentence:
In case all required documents for processing of the claim have been
submitted by the claimant, an RRB shall also issue a confirmation in this regard.
requirements.object: in this regard

conditions: in case of any pending or incomplete / incorrect documents
requirements.full_sentence:
However,
in case of any pending or incomplete / incorrect documents, the RRB shall intimate the
claimant about the list of such documents while acknowledging the receipt of claim.
requirements.object: the list of such documents while acknowledging the receipt of claim

requirements.full_sentence:
On
subsequent submission of all the required documents, the RRB shall issue a confirmation
to the claimant that all required documents have been received for processing of the
claim.
requirements.object: the claimant that all required documents have been received for processing of the claim

requirements.full_sentence: An RRB may provide the facility for online lodgement of such claims.
requirements.object: online lodgement of such claims

requirements.full_sentence:
Upon a
claimant uploading the claim form along with the required documents, the RRB shall send
acknowledgement / confirmation through appropriate channels and also make available
the provision for online tracking of the status of the claim.
requirements.object: through appropriate channels and also make available the provision for online tracking of the status of the claim

conditions:
if the RRB
requires the claimant to produce original documents for submission / verification
requirements.full_sentence:
In such cases, if the RRB
requires the claimant to produce original documents for submission / verification, the
same shall be allowed to be done at any of its branches.
requirements.object: done at any of its branches

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall settle a claim in respect of deposit accounts of a deceased customer
within a period not exceeding 15 calendar days from the date of receipt of all the required
documents associated with the claim.
requirements.object: respect of deposit accounts of a deceased customer within a period not exceeding 15 calendar days from the date of receipt of all th

conditions: In case of safe deposit locker / articles in safe custody
requirements.timeline:
within 15
calendar days of receipt of all the required documents
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of safe deposit locker / articles in safe custody, an RRB shall, within 15
calendar days of receipt of all the required documents, process the claim and
communicate with the claimant(s) for fixing the date for making inventory of the locker /
articles in safe custody.
requirements.object: days of receipt of all the required documents, process the claim and communicate with the claimant(s) for fixing the date for mak

conditions:
If any deposit related claim is not settled within the timeframe stipulated at paragraph
360 above
requirements.full_sentence:
If any deposit related claim is not settled within the timeframe stipulated at paragraph
360 above, then an RRB shall communicate the reasons for such delay to the claimant(s).
requirements.object: such delay to the claimant(s)

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, in cases of delay attributable to the RRB, compensation shall be paid by the RRB
in the form of interest, at a rate not less than the prevailing Bank Rate + 4 percent per
annum, on the settlement amount due for the period of delay.
requirements.object: RRB in the form of interest, at a rate not less than the prevailing Bank Rate + 4 percent per annum, on the settlement amount due for t

requirements.full_sentence:
The reference date for
reckoning the amount due and the prevailing Bank Rate shall be the date of receipt of all
required documents from the claimant.
requirements.object: receipt of all required documents from the claimant

requirements.full_sentence:
For claims related to safe deposit locker / articles in safe custody, an RRB shall be
required to pay compensation to the claimant(s) at the rate of ₹5,000 for each day of
delay, in cases where it doesn't adhere to the timeline prescribed in paragraph 361 above.
requirements.object: compensation to the claimant(s) at the rate of ₹5,000 for each day of delay, in cases where it doesn't adhere to the timeline presc

requirements.full_sentence:
Accordingly, an RRB shall follow the procedure for settlement of
claims in respect of such accounts as has been prescribed above for the accounts with /
without nominee / survivorship clause, as applicable.
requirements.object: settlement of claims in respect of such accounts as has been prescribed above for the accounts with / without nominee / survi

requirements.full_sentence:
In such cases, an RRB shall accept the original
<image>
certified copy of the document issued for 'proof of death', certified in the country of its
issuance in any one of the following modes:
(1) authorised officials of overseas branches of Scheduled Commercial Banks
registered in India;
requirements.object: certified copy of the document issued for 'proof of death', certified in the country of its issuance in any one of the fol

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall continue to spread awareness among its customers about the benefits
of the nomination facility / survivorship clause and give wide publicity to these facilities
along with the procedure for settlement of claims.
requirements.object: among its customers about the benefits of the nomination facility / survivorship clause and give wide publicity to these

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall ensure that all information relating to charges / fees for processing are
invariably disclosed in the loan application forms.
requirements.object: relating to charges / fees for processing are invariably disclosed in the loan application forms

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, an RRB shall inform 'all-in-cost'
to the customer to enable him / her to compare the rates charged with other sources of
finance.
requirements.object: customer to enable him / her to compare the rates charged with other sources of finance

requirements.full_sentence:
The following instructions shall be applicable in cases of all retail and MSME term
loan products extended by an RRB.
requirements.object: of all retail and MSME term loan products extended by an RRB

requirements.full_sentence:
Credit card receivables are exempted from the
provisions given below:
(1) An RRB shall provide a KFS to all prospective borrowers to help them take an
informed view before executing the loan contract, as per the standardised format given
in the Annex XIII.
requirements.object: all prospective borrowers to help them take an informed view before executing the loan contract, as per the standardised format given

requirements.full_sentence:
The KFS shall be written in a language understood by such
borrowers.
requirements.object: language understood by such borrowers

requirements.full_sentence:
Contents of KFS shall be explained to the borrower and an
acknowledgement shall be obtained that they have understood the same.
requirements.object: borrower and an acknowledgement shall be obtained that they have understood the same

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The KFS shall be provided with a unique proposal number and shall have a validity
period of at least three working days for loans having tenor of seven days or more, and
a validity period of one working day for loans having tenor of less than seven days.
requirements.object: unique proposal number and shall have a validity period of at least three working days for loans having tenor of seven days or more

requirements.full_sentence:
The RRB shall be
bound by the terms of the loan indicated in the KFS, if agreed to by the borrower during
the validity period.
requirements.object: terms of the loan indicated in the KFS

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The KFS shall also include a computation sheet of annual percentage rate (APR),
and the amortisation schedule of the loan over the loan tenor.
requirements.object: sheet of annual percentage rate (APR), and the amortisation schedule of the loan over the loan tenor
