requirements.full_sentence:
In all cases wherever the RRB
is involved in recovering such charges, the receipts and related documents shall be
provided to the borrower for each payment, within a reasonable time.
requirements.object: borrower for each payment, within a reasonable time

requirements.full_sentence:
(6) The KFS shall also be included as a summary box to be exhibited as part of the
loan agreement.
requirements.object: a summary box to be exhibited as part of the loan agreement

requirements.full_sentence: An RRB shall adhere to following instructions for charging penal charges on loans.
requirements.object: for charging penal charges on loans

requirements.full_sentence:
These instructions shall be applicable to all credit facilities offered by the RRB including
Cash Credit, Overdraft, securitisation and co-lending portfolios, etc.
requirements.object: credit facilities offered by the RRB including Cash Credit, Overdraft, securitisation and co-lending portfolios, etc

requirements.full_sentence:
However, these
instructions shall not apply to Credit Cards, External Commercial Borrowings, Trade
Credits (rupee / foreign currency export credit) and Structured Obligations which are
covered under product specific directions, as also other foreign currency loans.
requirements.object: External Commercial Borrowings, Trade Credits (rupee / foreign currency export credit) and Structured Obligations which are cov

conditions: if charged
requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
(1) Penalty, if charged, for non-compliance of material terms and conditions of loan
contract by the borrower shall be treated as 'penal charges' and shall not be levied in
the form of 'penal interest' that is added to the rate of interest charged on the advances.
requirements.object: form of 'penal interest' that is added to the rate of interest charged on the advances

requirements.full_sentence:
There shall be no capitalisation of penal charges, i.e., no further interest computed on
such charges.
requirements.object: penal charges, i

requirements.full_sentence:
Therefore, the RRB may charge interest on unpaid interest
(including on unpaid EMI) at the contracted rate of interest till the date of remediation,
and not at the penal rate of interest.
requirements.object: interest (including on unpaid EMI) at the contracted rate of interest till the date of remediation, and not at the penal rat

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall put in place an appropriate policy framework meeting the following
requirements for implementation and compliance:
(1) At the time of sanction, an RRB shall clearly communicate to the borrowers about
the possible impact of change in benchmark interest rate on the loan leading to
changes in EMI and / or tenor or both.
requirements.object: appropriate policy framework meeting the following requirements for implementation and compliance: (1) At the time of sanction, an RRB

requirements.full_sentence:
Subsequently, any increase in the EMI/ tenor or
both on account of the above shall be communicated to the borrower immediately
through appropriate channels.
requirements.object: borrower immediately through appropriate channels

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) At the time of reset of interest rates, an RRB may, at its option, provide a choice to
the borrowers to switch over to a fixed rate as per its Board approved policy.
requirements.object: provide a choice to the borrowers to switch over to a fixed rate as per its Board approved policy

requirements.full_sentence:
The policy,
inter alia, may also specify the number of times a borrower will be allowed to switch
during the tenor of the loan.
requirements.object: of times a borrower will be allowed to switch during the tenor of the loan

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The borrowers shall also be given the choice to opt for (i) enhancement in EMI or
elongation of tenor or for a combination of both options;
requirements.object: choice to opt for (i) enhancement in EMI or elongation of tenor or for a combination of both options

requirements.full_sentence:
Levy of foreclosure charges /
pre-payment penalty shall be subject to extant instructions.
requirements.object: instructions

requirements.full_sentence: the RRB shall provide the following options to the borrowers:
requirements.object: to the borrowers:

conditions:
In case of personal loans linked to an external benchmark under the
External Benchmark Lending Rate (EBLR) regime
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of personal loans linked to an external benchmark under the
External Benchmark Lending Rate (EBLR) regime, the bank shall follow extant
instructions and also put in place adequate information systems to monitor transmission
of changes in the benchmark rate to the lending rate
<image>
requirements.object: also put in place adequate information systems to monitor transmission of changes in the benchmark rate to the lending

conditions:
In case of existing floating rate term loans sanctioned to individual borrowers on or
before December 31
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of existing floating rate term loans sanctioned to individual borrowers on or
before December 31, 2025, an RRB shall not levy pre-payment charges.

An RRB shall adhere to the following directions regarding levy of pre-payment
charges on loans and advances (term loans as well as demand loans) sanctioned or
renewed on or after January 1, 2026.
requirements.object: directions regarding levy of pre-payment charges on loans and advances (term loans as well as demand loans) sanctioned or rene

requirements.full_sentence:
(1) For all floating rate loans granted for purposes other than business to individuals,
with or without co-obligant(s), an RRB shall not levy pre-payment charges.

(2) For all floating rate loans with sanctioned amount / limit up to ₹50 lakh granted for
business purpose to individuals and Micro and Small Enterprises (as defined in Micro,
Small and Medium Enterprises Development (MSMED) Act, 2006), with or without co-
obligant(s), an RRB shall not levy pre-payment charges.

(3) The Directions at paragraph 373(1) and 373(2) above shall be applicable
irrespective of the source of funds used for pre-payment of loans, either in part or in
full, and without any minimum lock-in period.
requirements.object: the source of funds used for pre-payment of loans, either in part or in full, and without any minimum lock-in period

requirements.full_sentence:
(5) In cases other than those mentioned at paragraphs 373(1) and 373(2) above, pre-
payment charges, if any, shall be as per the approved policy of the RRB.
requirements.object: approved policy of the RRB

conditions: if levied by the RRB
requirements.full_sentence:
However, in
case of term loans, pre-payment charges, if levied by the RRB, shall be based on the
amount being prepaid.
requirements.object: amount being prepaid

conditions: In case of cash credit / overdraft facilities
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of cash credit / overdraft facilities, pre-payment charges
on closure of the facility before the due date shall be levied on an amount not exceeding
the sanctioned limit.
requirements.object: amount not exceeding the sanctioned limit

conditions: In case of cash credit / overdraft facilities

provided that the facility
gets closed on the due date
requirements.full_sentence:
(6) In case of cash credit / overdraft facilities, no pre-payment charges shall be
applicable if the borrower intimates the RRB of his / her / its intention not to renew the
facility before the period as stipulated in the loan agreement, provided that the facility
gets closed on the due date.
requirements.object: borrower intimates the RRB of his / her / its intention not to renew the facility before the period as stipulated in the loan agreement

requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
(7) An RRB shall not levy any charges where pre-payment is effected at the instance
of the RRB.
requirements.object: pre-payment is effected at the instance of the RRB

requirements.full_sentence:
(8) The applicability or otherwise of pre-payment charges shall be clearly disclosed in
the sanction letter and loan agreement.
requirements.object: the sanction letter and loan agreement

conditions:
in case of loans and advances where
KFS is to be provided as specified in paragraph 368 above
requirements.full_sentence:
Further, in case of loans and advances where
KFS is to be provided as specified in paragraph 368 above, the same shall also be
mentioned in the KFS.
requirements.object: the KFS

requirements.full_sentence:
No pre-payment charges which have not been disclosed as
specified herein shall be charged by the RRB.
requirements.object: RRB

requirements.full_sentence:
(9) An RRB shall not levy any charges / fees retrospectively at the time of pre-payment
of loans, which were waived off earlier by the RRB.
requirements.object: fees retrospectively at the time of pre-payment of loans, which were waived off earlier by the RRB

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall release all the original movable / immovable property documents and
remove charges registered with any registry within a period of 30 days after full repayment
/ settlement of the loan account.
requirements.object: movable / immovable property documents and remove charges registered with any registry within a period of 30 days after full

conditions:
where the loan account was
serviced or any other office of the RRB where the documents are available
requirements.full_sentence:
The borrower shall be given the option of collecting the original movable / immovable
property documents either from the banking outlet / branch where the loan account was
serviced or any other office of the RRB where the documents are available, as per her /
his preference.
requirements.object: of collecting the original movable / immovable property documents either from the banking outlet / branch where the loan account w

requirements.full_sentence:
The timeline and place of return of original movable / immovable property
documents shall be mentioned in the loan sanction letters issued on or after December
1, 2023.
requirements.object: loan sanction letters issued on or after December 1, 2023

requirements.full_sentence:
In order to address the contingent event of demise of the sole borrower or joint
borrowers, an RRB shall have a well laid out procedure for return of original movable /
immovable property documents to the legal heir(s).
requirements.object: out procedure for return of original movable / immovable property documents to the legal heir(s)

requirements.full_sentence:
Such procedure shall be displayed on
the website of the RRB along with other similar policies and procedures for customer
information.
requirements.object: website of the RRB along with other similar policies and procedures for customer information

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall communicate to the borrower reasons for delay in releasing of original
movable / immovable property documents or failing to file charge satisfaction form with
relevant registry beyond 30 days after full repayment / settlement of loan.
requirements.object: reasons for delay in releasing of original movable / immovable property documents or failing to file charge satisfaction f

conditions:
In case where
the delay is attributable to the RRB
requirements.full_sentence:
In case where
the delay is attributable to the RRB, it shall compensate the borrower at the rate of ₹5,000
for each day of delay.
requirements.object: the rate of ₹5,000 for each day of delay

conditions: In case of loss / damage to original movable / immovable property documents
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of loss / damage to original movable / immovable property documents, either
in part or in full, an RRB shall assist the borrower in obtaining duplicate / certified copies
of the movable / immovable property documents and shall bear the associated costs, in
addition to paying compensation as indicated at paragraph 378 above.
requirements.object: obtaining duplicate / certified copies of the movable / immovable property documents and shall bear the associated costs, in ad

requirements.full_sentence:
The compensation provided under these directions shall be without prejudice to the
rights of a borrower to get any other compensation as per any applicable law.
requirements.object: the rights of a borrower to get any other compensation as per any applicable law

requirements.full_sentence:
Instructions issued vide these Directions shall be complied with as expeditiously as
possible but no later than April 1, 2026.
requirements.object: expeditiously as possible but no later than April 1, 2026

requirements.full_sentence:
The policy on lending against gold and silver collateral, as required in terms of
Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Credit Facilities) Directions, 2025 (herein
after referred to as 'the policy' in this section) / SOPs prepared under the policy shall
cover the conduct related aspects relating to:
(1) the assaying procedure of jewellery, ornaments, or coins made of gold and silver
("eligible collateral" for this section);
requirements.object: aspects relating to: (1) the assaying procedure of jewellery, ornaments, or coins made of gold and silver ("eligible collate

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB, which provides or intends to provide loans against eligible collateral, shall
ensure that a standardised procedure is put in place to assay the purity of gold and silver
collateral, its weight (gross as well as net), etc.
requirements.object: procedure is put in place to assay the purity of gold and silver collateral, its weight (gross as well as net), etc

requirements.full_sentence:
This procedure shall be adopted uniformly
across all its branches for all assaying procedures, without any deviation.
requirements.object: all its branches for all assaying procedures, without any deviation

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall display on its website the methodology adopted by it for determination
of net weight of the gold and silver content of the eligible collateral and the price used to
value the gold and silver content of the eligible collateral for determination of LTV ratio.
requirements.object: the methodology adopted by it for determination of net weight of the gold and silver content of the eligible collateral and the

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall ensure presence of the borrower(s) while assaying the collateral at
the time of sanctioning the loan.
requirements.object: borrower(s) while assaying the collateral at the time of sanctioning the loan

requirements.full_sentence:
The deductions relating to stone weight, fastenings, etc.,
as part of the assaying procedure shall be explained to the borrower(s) and details
incorporated in the certificate to be issued as per paragraph 389 below.
requirements.object: borrower(s) and details incorporated in the certificate to be issued as per paragraph 389 below

requirements.full_sentence:
Post pledging, cases involving loss of gold or silver collateral and any deterioration
or discrepancy in quantity or purity observed during internal audit or otherwise including
at the time of return or auction of collateral shall be recorded and communicated promptly
to the borrower(s)/ legal heir(s).
requirements.object: promptly to the borrower(s)/ legal heir(s)

requirements.full_sentence:
The process for making reimbursement or compensation
as per the policy or SOP shall also be communicated to the borrower(s)/ legal heir(s).
requirements.object: the borrower(s)/ legal heir(s)

requirements.full_sentence: Documentation shall be standardised across all branches of an RRB.
requirements.object: branches of an RRB

requirements.full_sentence:
The loan agreement shall cover the description of the eligible collateral taken as
security, value of such collateral, details of auction procedure and the circumstances
leading to the auction of the eligible collateral, the notice period which shall be allowed to
the borrower for repayment or settlement of loan before the auction is conducted,
timelines for release of pledged eligible collateral upon full repayment or settlement of
loan, refund of surplus, if any, from the auction of the pledged eligible collateral and other
necessary details.
requirements.object: the eligible collateral taken as security, value of such collateral, details of auction procedure and the circumstances leading to the auction of the eligible collateral, the notice period which shall be allowed to the borrower for repayment or settlement of loan before the auction is conducted, timelines for release of pledged eligible collateral upon full repayment or settlement of loan, refund of surplus

requirements.full_sentence:
All applicable charges payable by the borrower, including those related
to assaying, auction, etc., shall be clearly included in the loan agreement and KFS.
requirements.object: the loan agreement and KFS
e- certificate in duplicate on its letterhead regarding the assay of the collateral and state therein the purity (in terms of

requirements.full_sentence:
One copy of the certificate or e-certificate shall be kept as part of the loan documents and
the other copy be given to the borrower under their acknowledgement.
requirements.object: of the loan documents and the other copy be given to the borrower under their acknowledgement

requirements.full_sentence:
All communication with the borrower, especially, the terms and conditions of the
loan, or other important communication which affects the interest of the borrower or the
RRB, shall be in the language of the region or in a language as chosen by the borrower.
requirements.object: of the region or in a language as chosen by the borrower

requirements.full_sentence:
For an illiterate borrower, important terms and conditions shall be explained in the
presence of a witness, who shall not be an employee of the RRB.
requirements.object: the RRB

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall ensure that necessary infrastructure and facilities are put in place and
appropriate security measures taken in each of its branches where loans are sanctioned
against gold or silver collateral.
requirements.object: and facilities are put in place and appropriate security measures taken in each of its branches where loans are s

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall ensure that the gold and / or silver collateral is handled only in its
branches and only by its employees.
requirements.object: and / or silver collateral is handled only in its branches and only by its employees

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall store the collateral only in its branches which are manned by its
employees and having safe deposit vaults fit for storing gold and silver.
requirements.object: in its branches which are manned by its employees and having safe deposit vaults fit for storing gold and silver

requirements.full_sentence:
Normally, such
loans shall not be extended by branches that do not have appropriate secured facility for
storage of the pledged eligible collateral.
requirements.object: that do not have appropriate secured facility for storage of the pledged eligible collateral

requirements.full_sentence:
The pledged eligible collateral may be transported from one branch to another
branch, only as permitted under paragraph 403 below or in case of shifting or closure of
branch(es) or exceptional reasons as per the process laid down by an RRB in terms of
its policy.
requirements.object: branch to another branch, only as permitted under paragraph 403 below or in case of shifting or closure of branch(es) or excep

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall periodically review the adequacy of systems for storage of the eligible
collateral, conduct training of the concerned staff and carry out internal audit of all
procedures to ensure that these are strictly adhered to.
requirements.object: of systems for storage of the eligible collateral, conduct training of the concerned staff and carry out internal aud

requirements.full_sentence:
As part of internal audit, an RRB shall carry out periodic surprise verification of the
gold and silver collateral pledged with it and shall maintain a record thereof.
requirements.object: verification of the gold and silver collateral pledged with it and shall maintain a record thereof

requirements.full_sentence:
A clause in
the loan agreement shall be included for obtaining consent of the borrower(s) to carry out
surprise verification including assay of the pledged eligible collateral even in their absence
during the tenor of the loan.
requirements.object: consent of the borrower(s) to carry out surprise verification including assay of the pledged eligible collateral even in the

requirements.full_sentence:
This aspect shall be specifically communicated to the
borrower at the time of sanctioning the loan.
requirements.object: the borrower at the time of sanctioning the loan

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall release or return the pledged eligible collateral held as security to the
borrower(s) / legal heir(s) on the same day but in any case, not exceeding a maximum
period of seven working days upon full repayment or settlement of the loan.
requirements.object: pledged eligible collateral held as security to the borrower(s) / legal heir(s) on the same day but in any case, not exceeding a

requirements.full_sentence:
At the time of release of pledged eligible collateral to the borrower(s) / legal heir(s),
the collateral shall be verified for correctness as per details in the certificate (as per
paragraph 390) to the borrowers' satisfaction.
requirements.object: as per details in the certificate (as per paragraph 390) to the borrowers' satisfaction

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall give adequate notice to the borrower(s) / legal heir(s), as applicable,
through available means of communication to repay or settle the loan dues prior to
<image>
initiating the auction procedure.
requirements.object: the borrower(s) / legal heir(s), as applicable, through available means of communication to repay or settle the loan dues prio

requirements.full_sentence:
A copy of the notice and acknowledgement thereof shall
be kept on record in both scenarios.
requirements.object: in both scenarios

conditions:
provided that a period of one month has lapsed from the date of the
public notice
requirements.full_sentence:
In case an RRB is unable to locate the borrower(s) /
legal heir(s) despite best efforts and even after issuance of a public notice, it may proceed
with the auction, provided that a period of one month has lapsed from the date of the
public notice.
requirements.object: month has lapsed from the date of the public notice

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall implement a transparent auction procedure, which shall include, inter
alia, announcement of the auction to the public by issue of advertisements in at least two
newspapers, one in the regional language and another in a national daily.
requirements.object: procedure, which shall include, inter alia, announcement of the auction to the public by issue of advertisements in at

requirements.full_sentence:
The pledged eligible collateral shall be auctioned by an RRB only through its
employee having necessary experience and / or training or an auctioneer empanelled by
an RRB as per its policy.
requirements.object: RRB only through its employee having necessary experience and / or training or an auctioneer empanelled by an RRB as per its policy

conditions:
where auctions are conducted by the RRB through its
employees
requirements.full_sentence:
In cases where auctions are conducted by the RRB through its
employees, necessary safeguards such as surprise visits by regional/ controlling officials
on periodic basis, coverage under internal audit, etc., shall be put in place.

An RRB shall declare a reserve price for the gold and silver collateral at the time of
auction, which shall not be less than 90 per cent of its current value.
requirements.object: per cent of its current value

conditions: Provided that in case auctions fail twice
requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that in case auctions fail twice, a reserve price not less than 85 per cent of its
current value shall be adopted.

The first auction shall be conducted physically in the same district in which the
lending branch is located.
requirements.object: the same district in which the lending branch is located

conditions: in case of failure of first auction
requirements.full_sentence:
However, in case of failure of first auction, the RRB may
conduct the auction in an adjoining district or conduct online auction.
requirements.object: an adjoining district or conduct online auction

requirements.full_sentence:
As a matter of policy, the RRB or its related parties shall not participate in the
auctions to ensure that there is no potential conflict of interest.
requirements.object: to ensure that there is no potential conflict of interest

requirements.full_sentence:
After the auction, the RRB shall mandatorily provide full details of the value fetched
at the auction and the dues adjusted to the borrower(s) / legal heir(s).
requirements.object: of the value fetched at the auction and the dues adjusted to the borrower(s) / legal heir(s)

conditions:
if any,
from the auction of the gold or silver collateral
requirements.full_sentence:
The surplus, if any,
from the auction of the gold or silver collateral, shall be refunded to the borrower(s) / legal
heir(s) within a maximum period of seven working days from the date of receipt of the full
auction proceeds.
requirements.object: borrower(s) / legal heir(s) within a maximum period of seven working days from the date of receipt of the full auction proceeds

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB may recover shortfall, if any, as per terms of the loan
agreement.

conditions:
In case of any damage to the pledged eligible collateral by an RRB during the tenor
of loan
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of any damage to the pledged eligible collateral by an RRB during the tenor
of loan, the cost of repair shall be borne by the RRB.
requirements.object: RRB

requirements.full_sentence:
In case of loss of the pledged eligible collateral and / or any loss emanating from
deterioration or discrepancy in quantity or purity observed during internal audit or
otherwise including at the time of return or auction of collateral, an RRB shall suitably
compensate the borrower(s) / legal heir(s).
requirements.object: / legal heir(s)

conditions:
In case of delay in release of the pledged collateral after full repayment or settlement
of loan by the borrower
where reasons for delay are attributable to an RRB
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of delay in release of the pledged collateral after full repayment or settlement
of loan by the borrower, where reasons for delay are attributable to an RRB, the RRB
shall compensate the borrower(s) / legal heir(s) at the rate of ₹5,000 for each day of delay
beyond the timeline prescribed at paragraph 397 above.
requirements.object: legal heir(s) at the rate of ₹5,000 for each day of delay beyond the timeline prescribed at paragraph 397 above

conditions:
If the delay is not attributable to
an RRB
requirements.full_sentence:
If the delay is not attributable to
an RRB, it shall communicate reasons for such delay to the borrower(s) / legal heir(s).
requirements.object: delay to the borrower(s) / legal heir(s)

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, where the borrower(s) / legal heir(s) has not approached an RRB for release of
pledged eligible collateral after full repayment or settlement of loan, the RRB shall issue
periodic reminders to borrower(s) / legal heir(s) through letters, email or SMS if the email
and mobile number are registered with the bank.
requirements.object: borrower(s) / legal heir(s) through letters, email or SMS if the email and mobile number are registered with the bank

requirements.full_sentence:
The compensation provided under paragraphs 406 to 408 above shall be without
prejudice to the rights of a borrower to get any other compensation as per any applicable
law.
requirements.object: the rights of a borrower to get any other compensation as per any applicable law

requirements.full_sentence:
The pledged gold or silver collateral lying with an RRB beyond two years from the
date of full repayment or settlement of loan shall be treated as unclaimed.

An RRB shall
periodically undertake special drives to ascertain the whereabouts of the borrower(s) /
legal heir(s) in respect of such unclaimed gold and silver collateral.
requirements.object: to ascertain the whereabouts of the borrower(s) / legal heir(s) in respect of such unclaimed gold and silver col

requirements.full_sentence:
A report on unclaimed gold and silver collateral shall be put up to the Customer
Service Committee or the Board, as the case may be, at half-yearly intervals for a review.
requirements.object: the Customer Service Committee or the Board, as the case may be, at half-yearly intervals for a review

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall refrain from issuance of misleading advertisements containing
unrealistic claims to promote loans against gold or silver collateral.
requirements.object: misleading advertisements containing unrealistic claims to promote loans against gold or silver collateral

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall ensure that all arrangements for sourcing and / or recovery of loans
against eligible collateral, are in compliance with applicable instructions on outsourcing
and recovery practices.
requirements.object: for sourcing and / or recovery of loans against eligible collateral, are in compliance with applicable instructions on ou

requirements.full_sentence:
For prudential related aspects, the RRB shall be guided by the instructions
contained in the Chapter on 'Lending against Gold and Silver Collateral' in Reserve Bank
of India (Regional Rural Banks - Credit Facilities) Directions, 2025.
requirements.object: instructions contained in the Chapter on 'Lending against Gold and Silver Collateral' in Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks

requirements.full_sentence:
A Fair Practices Code (FPC) for microfinance loans based on these directions shall
be put in place by an RRB with the approval of its Board.
requirements.object: by an RRB with the approval of its Board

requirements.full_sentence:
The FPC shall be displayed by
the RRB in all its branches and on its website.
requirements.object: RRB in all its branches and on its website

requirements.full_sentence:
The FPC shall be issued in a language
understood by the borrower.
requirements.object: language understood by the borrower

requirements.full_sentence:
There shall be a standard form of loan agreement for microfinance loans in a
language understood by the borrower.
requirements.object: of loan agreement for microfinance loans in a language understood by the borrower
to the borrower which shall incorporate the following: (1) Information which adequately identifies the borrower

requirements.full_sentence: All entries in the loan card shall be in a language understood by the borrower.
requirements.object: understood by the borrower

requirements.full_sentence:
Issuance of non-credit products shall be with full consent of the borrowers and fee
structure for such products shall be explicitly communicated to the borrower in the loan
card itself.
requirements.object: of the borrowers and fee structure for such products shall be explicitly communicated to the borrower in the loan card itself

requirements.full_sentence: There shall be no pre-payment charge on microfinance loans.
requirements.object: on microfinance loans

requirements.full_sentence:
Charges, if any, for
delayed payment shall be applied on the overdue amount and not on the entire loan
amount.
requirements.object: overdue amount and not on the entire loan amount

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall prominently display the minimum, maximum and average interest
rates charged on microfinance loans in all its offices, in the literature (information booklets
/ pamphlets) issued by it and details on its website.
requirements.object: maximum and average interest rates charged on microfinance loans in all its offices, in the literature (information b

requirements.full_sentence:
This information shall also be included
in the supervisory returns and subjected to supervisory scrutiny.
requirements.object: the supervisory returns and subjected to supervisory scrutiny

requirements.full_sentence:
Any change in interest rate or any other charge shall be informed to the borrower
well in advance and these changes shall be effective only prospectively.
requirements.object: borrower well in advance and these changes shall be effective only prospectively

requirements.full_sentence:
As part of their awareness campaigns, Self-Regulatory Organisations (SROs) /
other industry associations may publish the range of interest rates on microfinance loans
charged by their members operating in a district.
requirements.object: interest rates on microfinance loans charged by their members operating in a district

requirements.full_sentence:
SROs / other industry associations may
also sensitise their members against charging of usurious interest rates.
requirements.object: against charging of usurious interest rates

requirements.full_sentence:
RBI shall also make available information regarding interest charged by RRBs on
microfinance loans.
requirements.object: regarding interest charged by RRBs on microfinance loans

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall have a Board-approved policy regarding the conduct of employees
and system for their recruitment, training and monitoring.
requirements.object: regarding the conduct of employees and system for their recruitment, training and monitoring

requirements.full_sentence:
This policy shall, inter alia, lay
down minimum qualifications for the staff and shall provide necessary training tools to
deal with the customers.
requirements.object: down minimum qualifications for the staff and shall provide necessary training tools to deal with the customers

requirements.full_sentence:
Training to employees shall include programs to inculcate
appropriate behaviour towards customers.
requirements.object: appropriate behaviour towards customers

requirements.full_sentence:
Conduct of employees towards customers
shall also be incorporated appropriately in their compensation matrix.
requirements.object: in their compensation matrix

requirements.full_sentence:
Field staff shall be trained to make necessary enquiries regarding the income and
existing debt of the household.
requirements.object: necessary enquiries regarding the income and existing debt of the household

requirements.full_sentence: Training, if any, offered to the borrowers shall be free of cost.

An RRB shall put in place a mechanism for identification of the borrowers facing
repayment related difficulties, engagement with such borrowers and providing them
necessary guidance about the recourse available.
requirements.object: mechanism for identification of the borrowers facing repayment related difficulties, engagement with such borrowers and providing them

requirements.full_sentence:
Recovery shall be made at a designated / central designated place decided mutually
by the borrower and the RRB.
requirements.object: designated / central designated place decided mutually by the borrower and the RRB

requirements.full_sentence:
However, field staff shall be allowed to make recovery at
the place of residence or work of the borrower if the borrower fails to appear at the
designated / central designated place on two or more successive occasions.
requirements.object: recovery at the place of residence or work of the borrower if the borrower fails to appear at the designated / central designated p

requirements.full_sentence: An RRB or its agent shall not engage in any harsh methods towards recovery.
requirements.object: methods towards recovery

requirements.full_sentence:
Without limiting the general application of the foregoing, following practices shall be
deemed as harsh:
(1) Use of threatening or abusive language
(2) Persistently calling the borrower and / or calling the borrower before 9:00 a.m.
requirements.object: (1) Use of threatening or abusive language (2) Persistently calling the borrower and / or calling the borrower before 9:00 a

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Harassing relatives, friends, or co-workers of the borrower
(4) Publishing the name of borrowers
(5) Use or threat of use of violence or other similar means to harm the borrower or
borrower's family / assets / reputation
(6) Misleading the borrower about the extent of the debt or the consequences of non-
repayment.
requirements.object: or borrower's family / assets / reputation (6) Misleading the borrower about the extent of the debt or the consequences of non- r

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall have a dedicated mechanism for redressal of recovery related
grievances.
requirements.object: for redressal of recovery related grievances

requirements.full_sentence:
The details of this mechanism shall be provided to the borrower at the time
of loan disbursal.
requirements.object: borrower at the time of loan disbursal

requirements.full_sentence:
Recovery agents shall mean agencies engaged by an RRB for recovery of dues
from its borrowers and the employees of these agencies.
requirements.object: an RRB for recovery of dues from its borrowers and the employees of these agencies

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall have a due diligence process in place for engagement of recovery
agents, which shall, inter alia, cover individuals involved in the recovery process.
requirements.object: process in place for engagement of recovery agents, which shall, inter alia, cover individuals involved in the recovery process

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB
shall ensure that the recovery agents engaged by it carry out verification of the
antecedents of its employees, which shall include police verification.
requirements.object: agents engaged by it carry out verification of the antecedents of its employees, which shall include police verification

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall also
decide the periodicity at which re-verification of antecedents shall be resorted to.
requirements.object: at which re-verification of antecedents shall be resorted to

requirements.full_sentence:
To ensure due notice and appropriate authorisation, an RRB shall provide the details
of recovery agents to the borrower while initiating the process of recovery.
requirements.object: recovery agents to the borrower while initiating the process of recovery

requirements.full_sentence:
The agent shall
also carry a copy of the notice and the authorisation letter from the RRB along with the
identity card issued to him / her by the RRB or the agency.
requirements.object: of the notice and the authorisation letter from the RRB along with the identity card issued to him / her by the RRB or the agency

conditions:
where the recovery
agency is changed by an RRB during the recovery process
requirements.full_sentence:
Further, where the recovery
agency is changed by an RRB during the recovery process, in addition to the RRB
notifying the borrower of the change, the new agent shall carry the notice and the
authorisation letter along with his / her identity card.
requirements.object: the authorisation letter along with his / her identity card

requirements.full_sentence:
The notice and the authorisation letter shall, among other details, also include the
contact details of the recovery agency and the RRB.
requirements.object: also include the contact details of the recovery agency and the RRB

requirements.full_sentence:
The up-to-date details of the recovery agencies engaged by an RRB shall also be
hosted on its website.
requirements.object: its website

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall strictly ensure that they or their agents do not resort to intimidation or
harassment of any kind, either verbal or physical, against any person in their debt
collection efforts, including acts intended to humiliate publicly or intrude upon the privacy
of the debtors' family members, referees and friends, sending inappropriate messages
either on mobile or through social media, making threatening and / or anonymous calls,
persistently calling the borrower and / or calling the borrower before 8:00 a.m.
requirements.object: or their agents do not resort to intimidation or harassment of any kind, either verbal or physical, against any person in th

requirements.full_sentence: This direction shall not be applicable to microfinance loans.
requirements.object: loans

requirements.full_sentence:
Standing instructions shall be freely accepted on all current and savings bank
accounts.
requirements.object: all current and savings bank accounts

requirements.full_sentence:
The scope of standing instructions service should be enlarged to include
payments on account of taxes, rents, bills, school / college fees, licences, etc.
requirements.object: payments on account of taxes, rents, bills, school / college fees, licences, etc

requirements.full_sentence:
Clean overdrafts for small amounts may be permitted at the discretion of branch
manager to customers whose dealings have been satisfactory.
requirements.object: discretion of branch manager to customers whose dealings have been satisfactory

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB may work out
schemes in this regard.
requirements.object: this regard

requirements.full_sentence:
All transactions, including payment of interest on deposits / charging of interest
on advances, shall be rounded off to the nearest rupee i.e., fractions of 50 paise and
above shall be rounded off to the next higher rupee and fraction of less than 50 paise
shall be ignored.
requirements.object: the nearest rupee i

requirements.full_sentence: Issue prices of cash certificates shall also be rounded off in the same manner.
requirements.object: in the same manner

requirements.full_sentence:
The RRB shall ensure that appropriate
action is taken against members of its staff who are found to have refused to accept
cheques / drafts containing fractions of a rupee.
requirements.object: is taken against members of its staff who are found to have refused to accept cheques / drafts containing fractions of

requirements.full_sentence:
While delegating the power to declare public holidays within concerned
States under Section 25 of the Negotiable Instruments Act, 1881, the Central
Government has stipulated that the delegation is subject to the condition that the
Central Government may itself exercise the said function, should it deem fit to do so.
requirements.object: function, should it deem fit to do so

requirements.full_sentence:
An RRB shall extend necessary help / co-ordination to tax officials whenever
required.
requirements.object: co-ordination to tax officials whenever required

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the RRB shall view with serious concern cases where its staff
connives / assists in any manner with offences punishable under the Income Tax Act.
requirements.object: cases where its staff connives / assists in any manner with offences punishable under the Income Tax Act

requirements.full_sentence:
In such cases in addition to the normal criminal action, such staff member shall also
be proceeded against departmentally.
requirements.object: departmentally

requirements.full_sentence:
The Directions, instructions and guidelines
repealed prior to the issuance of these Directions shall continue to remain repealed.

Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to
be governed by the provisions thereof.
requirements.object: by the provisions thereof

requirements.full_sentence:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted
under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
requirements.object: by these Directions

requirements.full_sentence:
Further,
the repeal of these directions, instructions, or guidelines shall not in any way
prejudicially affect:
(1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder;
requirements.object: affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

conditions: if those directions
requirements.full_sentence:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be
imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
requirements.object: enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being
in force.
requirements.object: and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

conditions: if it considers necessary
requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in
respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of these
Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.

(ii) If your complaint is unresolved at the branch level, you may approach our Regional/Zonal
